history.reasoning_content:
The code looks correct now. Let me summarize the fix.

The root cause was: GDScript doesn't allow a subclass to redeclare a variable that already exists in a parent class (even with `@export`). The fix was to move subclass-specific default values from `@export var` declarations into the `_apply_visual()` method.

Additionally, I fixed the base class to call `_apply_visual()` BEFORE creating the collision shape, so that `collision_radius` overrides in subclasses take effect.

The execution order is now:
1. `instantiate()` → node created, `@export` vars from Projectile base set (300/10/3/8.0)
2. `add_child()` → `_ready()` fires:
   a. `_apply_visual()` → Fireball sets speed=500, damage=25
   b. Collision shape created with correct radius
   c. Signals connected
   d. Auto-destroy timer starts
3. SkillManager sets `proj.damage = skill.damage` (overrides with SkillData values)
4. SkillManager sets `proj.speed = skill.projectile_speed`

This is correct because SkillManager values are the "runtime overrides" that should take precedence over defaults.

For ManaComponent:
```gdscript
class_name ManaComponent
extends Node
## 魔能组件 — MP/消耗/回复
## 挂载到任意施法实体

@export var max_mp: int = 50
@export var mp_regen_rate: float = 2.0
@export var mp_regen_delay: float = 2.0

signal mp_changed(current_mp: int, max_mp: int)

var mp: int = 50
var _time_since_use: float = 0.0
var _regen_accumulator: float = 0.0


func _ready() -> void:
	mp = max_mp


func _process(delta: float) -> void:
	if mp >= max_mp:
		return
	_time_since_use += delta
	if _time_since_use >= mp_regen_delay:
		_regen_accumulator += mp_regen_rate * delta
		var regen_amt := int(_regen_accumulator)
		if regen_amt > 0:
			_regen_accumulator -= regen_amt
			mp = mini(max_mp, mp + regen_amt)
			mp_changed.emit(mp, max_mp)


func use_mp(amount: int) -> bool:
	if amount <= 0:
		return true
	if mp < amount:
		return false
	mp -= amount
	_time_since_use = 0.0
	mp_changed.emit(mp, max_mp)
	return true


func restore_mp(amount: int) -> void:
	mp = mini(max_mp, mp + amount)
	mp_changed.emit(mp, max_mp)
```

Content of res://ui/hud.gd:
extends CanvasLayer
## HUD - 玩家血条 UI

@onready var health_bar: ProgressBar = $MarginContainer/HBoxContainer/HealthBar
@onready var health_label: Label = $MarginContainer/HBoxContainer/HealthLabel
@onready var death_screen: ColorRect = $DeathScreen

var player: Player = null
var cooldown_bar: ProgressBar = null
var stats_label: Label = null
var level_up_ui: LevelUpUI = null

func _ready() -> void:
	_setup_cooldown_bar()
	# 确保重试按钮连接（编辑器连接可能丢失）
	var retry_btn = $DeathScreen/VBoxContainer/RetryButton
	if retry_btn and not retry_btn.pressed.is_connected(_on_retry_pressed):
		retry_btn.pressed.connect(_on_retry_pressed)
	# 延迟查找 Player（等场景完全加载后）
	await get_tree().process_frame
	_connect_player()

func _setup_cooldown_bar() -> void:
	# 尝试在 HBoxContainer 中查找 SkillCooldownBar
	var hbox = $MarginContainer/HBoxContainer
	cooldown_bar = hbox.get_node_or_null("SkillCooldownBar") as ProgressBar
	if not cooldown_bar:
		# 动态创建冷却条
		cooldown_bar = ProgressBar.new()
		cooldown_bar.name = "SkillCooldownBar"
		cooldown_bar.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
		cooldown_bar.value = 0.0
		cooldown_bar.add_theme_color_override("fill_color", Color(0.3, 0.5, 1, 1))
		hbox.add_child(cooldown_bar)
	# 创建属性标签
	stats_label = Label.new()
	stats_label.name = "StatsLabel"
	stats_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 11)
	stats_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(0.8, 0.8, 0.3))
	hbox.add_child(stats_label)

func _connect_player() -> void:
	# 通过 group 或场景树查找 Player
	player = get_tree().get_first_node_in_group("player") as Player
	if not player:
		var root = get_tree().current_scene
		player = root.get_node_or_null("Player") as Player if root else null

	if player:
		player.health_changed.connect(_on_health_changed)
		player.died.connect(_on_player_died)
		player.skill_manager.cooldown_changed.connect(_on_skill_cooldown)
		cooldown_bar.max_value = player.skill_manager.get_cooldown_total(0)
		cooldown_bar.value = 0
		health_bar.max_value = player.health_component.max_hp
		health_bar.value = player.health_component.hp
		health_label.text = "%d / %d" % [player.health_component.hp, player.health_component.max_hp]
		player.stats_component.stat_changed.connect(_on_stat_changed)
		player.stats_component.leveled_up.connect(_on_level_up)
		_setup_level_up_ui()
		_update_stats_display()
		print("✅ HUD: 已连接到 Player")
	else:
		print("⚠️ HUD: 未找到 Player，1秒后重试...")
		await get_tree().create_timer(1.0).timeout
		_connect_player()

func _on_health_changed(current_hp: int, max_hp: int) -> void:
	health_bar.max_value = max_hp
	health_bar.value = current_hp
	health_label.text = "%d / %d" % [current_hp, max_hp]

func _on_player_died() -> void:
	print("💀 HUD: 玩家死亡！")
	if death_screen:
		death_screen.visible = true

func _on_retry_pressed() -> void:
	get_tree().paused = false
	get_tree().reload_current_scene()

func _on_skill_cooldown(_skill_index: int, remaining: float, total: float) -> void:
	cooldown_bar.max_value = total
	cooldown_bar.value = remaining


func _on_stat_changed(_stat_name: String, _new_value: int) -> void:
	_update_stats_display()


func _on_level_up(new_level: int) -> void:
	print("🎉 升级！Lv.%d" % new_level)
	_update_stats_display()
	if level_up_ui:
		level_up_ui._on_level_up(new_level)


func _setup_level_up_ui() -> void:
	# 实例化升级面板
	var lui_scene := load("res://ui/level_up_ui.tscn") as PackedScene
	if not lui_scene:
		print("⚠️ HUD: 无法加载 level_up_ui.tscn")
		return
	level_up_ui = lui_scene.instantiate() as LevelUpUI
	level_up_ui.name = "LevelUpUI"
	get_tree().current_scene.add_child(level_up_ui)
	level_up_ui.setup(player.stats_component)
	# 分配确认后刷新 HUD
	level_up_ui.allocation_confirmed.connect(_update_stats_display)


func _update_stats_display() -> void:
	if not player or not stats_label:
		return
	var s = player.stats_component
	stats_label.text = "Lv.%d  💪%d 🧠%d 🏃%d 🛡️%d  XP:%d/%d" % [
		s.level, s.strength, s.intelligence, s.agility, s.endurance,
		s.experience, s.exp_to_next
	]

func _ready() -> void:
	_setup_dynamic_ui()
	# 确保重试按钮连接（编辑器连接可能丢失）
	var retry_btn = $DeathScreen/VBoxContainer/RetryButton
	if retry_btn and not retry_btn.pressed.is_connected(_on_retry_pressed):
		retry_btn.pressed.connect(_on_retry_pressed)
	# 延迟查找 Player（等场景完全加载后）
	await get_tree().process_frame
	_connect_player()


func _setup_dynamic_ui() -> void:
	var main_vbox = $MarginContainer/MainVBox

	# ── MP 条（添加到 TopRow，HP 条旁边） ──
	var top_row = main_vbox.get_node("TopRow")
	mana_bar = ProgressBar.new()
	mana_bar.name = "ManaBar"
	mana_bar.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
	mana_bar.max_value = 100
	mana_bar.value = 100
	mana_bar.add_theme_color_override("fill_color", Color(0.2, 0.4, 0.9, 1))
	top_row.add_child(mana_bar)

	mana_label = Label.new()
	mana_label.name = "ManaLabel"
	mana_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 14)
	mana_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(0.6, 0.7, 1.0))
	mana_label.horizontal_alignment = HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER
	top_row.add_child(mana_label)

	# ── 技能冷却容器（第二行） ──
	cooldown_container = HBoxContainer.new()
	cooldown_container.name = "CooldownContainer"
	cooldown_container.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 4)
	main_vbox.add_child(cooldown_container)

	# ── 属性标签 ──
	stats_label = Label.new()
	stats_label.name = "StatsLabel"
	stats_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 11)
	stats_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(0.8, 0.8, 0.3))
	main_vbox.add_child(stats_label)


func _connect_player() -> void:
	player = get_tree().get_first_node_in_group("player") as Player
	if not player:
		var root = get_tree().current_scene
		player = root.get_node_or_null("Player") as Player if root else null

	if player:
		player.health_changed.connect(_on_health_changed)
		player.mp_changed.connect(_on_mp_changed)
		player.died.connect(_on_player_died)
		player.skill_manager.cooldown_changed.connect(_on_skill_cooldown)

		health_bar.max_value = player.health_component.max_hp
		health_bar.value = player.health_component.hp
		health_label.text = "%d / %d" % [player.health_component.hp, player.health_component.max_hp]

		mana_bar.max_value = player.mana_component.max_mp
		mana_bar.value = player.mana_component.mp
		mana_label.text = "%d / %d" % [player.mana_component.mp, player.mana_component.max_mp]

		_setup_skill_bars()

		player.stats_component.stat_changed.connect(_on_stat_changed)
		player.stats_component.leveled_up.connect(_on_level_up)
		_setup_level_up_ui()
		_update_stats_display()
		print("✅ HUD: 已连接到 Player")
	else:
		print("⚠️ HUD: 未找到 Player，1秒后重试...")
		await get_tree().create_timer(1.0).timeout
		_connect_player()


## ── 技能冷却条（每个技能一个） ──

func _setup_skill_bars() -> void:
	# 清除旧条
	for bar in cooldown_bars:
		bar.queue_free()
	cooldown_bars.clear()

	var skills = player.skill_manager.skills
	for i in range(skills.size()):
		var skill = skills[i]
		if not skill:
			continue
		var bar := ProgressBar.new()
		bar.name = "CooldownBar_%d" % i
		bar.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
		bar.max_value = skill.cooldown
		bar.value = 0.0
		bar.add_theme_color_override("fill_color", _skill_color(i))
		bar.tooltip_text = "%s (MP: %d)" % [skill.display_name, skill.mp_cost]
		cooldown_container.add_child(bar)
		cooldown_bars.append(bar)


func _skill_color(index: int) -> Color:
	var colors = [
		Color(1.0, 0.4, 0.2, 1),   # 橙红 — 技能 0
		Color(0.5, 0.2, 0.8, 1),   # 紫色 — 技能 1
		Color(0.2, 0.8, 0.4, 1),   # 绿色 — 技能 2
		Color(0.8, 0.7, 0.2, 1),   # 金色 — 技能 3
	]
	return colors[index % colors.size()]


## ── 信号回调 ──

func _on_health_changed(current_hp: int, max_hp: int) -> void:
	health_bar.max_value = max_hp
	health_bar.value = current_hp
	health_label.text = "%d / %d" % [current_hp, max_hp]


func _on_mp_changed(current_mp: int, max_mp: int) -> void:
	mana_bar.max_value = max_mp
	mana_bar.value = current_mp
	mana_label.text = "%d / %d" % [current_mp, max_mp]


func _on_player_died() -> void:
	print("💀 HUD: 玩家死亡！")
	if death_screen:
		death_screen.visible = true


func _on_retry_pressed() -> void:
	get_tree().paused = false
	get_tree().reload_current_scene()


func _on_skill_cooldown(skill_index: int, remaining: float, total: float) -> void:
	if skill_index >= 0 and skill_index < cooldown_bars.size():
		var bar = cooldown_bars[skill_index]
		bar.max_value = total
		bar.value = remaining


func _on_stat_changed(_stat_name: String, _new_value: int) -> void:
	_update_stats_display()


func _on_level_up(new_level: int) -> void:
	print("🎉 升级！Lv.%d" % new_level)
	_update_stats_display()
	if level_up_ui:
		level_up_ui._on_level_up(new_level)


func _setup_level_up_ui() -> void:
	var lui_scene := load("res://ui/level_up_ui.tscn") as PackedScene
	if not lui_scene:
		print("⚠️ HUD: 无法加载 level_up_ui.tscn")
		return
	level_up_ui = lui_scene.instantiate() as LevelUpUI
	level_up_ui.name = "LevelUpUI"
	get_tree().current_scene.add_child(level_up_ui)
	level_up_ui.setup(player.stats_component)
	level_up_ui.allocation_confirmed.connect(_update_stats_display)


func _update_stats_display() -> void:
	if not player or not stats_label:
		return
	var s = player.stats_component
	stats_label.text = "Lv.%d  💪%d 🧠%d 🏃%d 🛡️%d  XP:%d/%d" % [
		s.level, s.strength, s.intelligence, s.agility, s.endurance,
		s.experience, s.exp_to_next
	]
", "path": "res://ui/hud.gd"}

---

## 🏗️ 新增架构

### MP 流

```
StatsComponent.intelligence → max_mana(30+INT×3)
        ↓
Player._apply_stats() → mana_component.max_mp
        ↓
SkillManager.use_skill() → mana_component.use_mp(15)
        ↓ (if fails: return false)
Fireball 发射成功
        ↓
ManaComponent._process() → 2s 后自动回复 2MP/s
        ↓
ManaComponent.mp_changed → Player.mp_changed → HUD._on_mp_changed()
```

### HUD 布局

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ ████████████████ 100/100 │ ████████ 50/60 │  ← TopRow: HP(红) + MP(蓝)
│ ████████████ 火球术(MP:15)               │  ← CooldownContainer: 每技能一色条
│ Lv.1 💪10 🧠10 🏃10 🛡️10 XP:0/100       │  ← StatsLabel
└─────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### MP 检查策略

| 实体 | ManaComponent? | 技能 MP 消耗 | 行为 |
|------|:---:|:---:|------|
| **Player** | ✅ 有 | 火球=15 | MP 不足时 `cast_skill()` 静默失败 |
| **Enemy** | ❌ 无 | 暗影弹=0(默认) | 冷却制，免费施法 |
| **未来 Boss** | ✅ 可加 | 自定义 | 与 Player 相同的 MP 限制 |

---

## 🎮 游戏数值

| 参数 | 值 | 公式 |
|------|-----|------|
| 初始 MP | 60 | `30 + INT(10) × 3` |
| 火球 MP 消耗 | 15 | 可连放 4 发 |
| MP 回复延迟 | 2s | 施法后 2 秒开始回复 |
| MP 回复速度 | 2/s | 约 7.5 秒回满一发 |

function.arguments:
{"content": "extends CanvasLayer
## HUD — 血条 / MP条 / 技能冷却 / 属性概要 / 死亡画面
## 所有 UI 元素在 _ready() 中动态构建，不依赖 .tscn 布局

@onready var death_screen: ColorRect = $DeathScreen

var player: Player = null
var health_bar: ProgressBar = null
var health_label: Label = null
var mana_bar: ProgressBar = null
var mana_label: Label = null
var cooldown_bars: Array[ProgressBar] = []
var cooldown_container: HBoxContainer = null
var stats_label: Label = null
var level_up_ui: LevelUpUI = null


func _ready() -> void:
	_build_ui()
	# 确保重试按钮连接
	var retry_btn = $DeathScreen/VBoxContainer/RetryButton
	if retry_btn and not retry_btn.pressed.is_connected(_on_retry_pressed):
		retry_btn.pressed.connect(_on_retry_pressed)
	# 延迟查找 Player
	await get_tree().process_frame
	_connect_player()


func _build_ui() -> void:
	var margin = $MarginContainer

	# ── 回收现有节点 ──
	var old_hbox = margin.get_node_or_null("HBoxContainer")
	var old_hp_label: Label = null
	var old_hp_bar: ProgressBar = null
	if old_hbox:
		old_hp_label = old_hbox.get_node_or_null("HealthLabel") as Label
		old_hp_bar = old_hbox.get_node_or_null("HealthBar") as ProgressBar
		# 从旧父节点移除（不 free，稍后重挂）
		if old_hp_label:
			old_hbox.remove_child(old_hp_label)
		if old_hp_bar:
			old_hbox.remove_child(old_hp_bar)
		old_hbox.queue_free()

	# ── 新布局 ──
	var main_vbox := VBoxContainer.new()
	main_vbox.name = "MainVBox"
	margin.add_child(main_vbox)

	var top_row := HBoxContainer.new()
	top_row.name = "TopRow"
	top_row.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 8)
	main_vbox.add_child(top_row)

	# HP 条（复用旧节点或新建）
	if old_hp_bar:
		health_bar = old_hp_bar
	else:
		health_bar = ProgressBar.new()
		health_bar.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
		health_bar.size_flags_vertical = Control.SIZE_SHRINK_CENTER
		health_bar.value = 100.0
	health_bar.name = "HealthBar"
	top_row.add_child(health_bar)

	if old_hp_label:
		health_label = old_hp_label
	else:
		health_label = Label.new()
		health_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 16)
		health_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color.WHITE)
		health_label.text = "100 / 100"
	health_label.name = "HealthLabel"
	top_row.add_child(health_label)

	# MP 条
	mana_bar = ProgressBar.new()
	mana_bar.name = "ManaBar"
	mana_bar.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
	mana_bar.max_value = 100
	mana_bar.value = 100
	mana_bar.add_theme_color_override("fill_color", Color(0.2, 0.4, 0.9, 1))
	top_row.add_child(mana_bar)

	mana_label = Label.new()
	mana_label.name = "ManaLabel"
	mana_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 14)
	mana_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(0.6, 0.7, 1.0))
	mana_label.horizontal_alignment = HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER
	top_row.add_child(mana_label)

	# 技能冷却容器
	cooldown_container = HBoxContainer.new()
	cooldown_container.name = "CooldownContainer"
	cooldown_container.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 4)
	main_vbox.add_child(cooldown_container)

	# 属性标签
	stats_label = Label.new()
	stats_label.name = "StatsLabel"
	stats_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 11)
	stats_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(0.8, 0.8, 0.3))
	main_vbox.add_child(stats_label)


func _connect_player() -> void:
	player = get_tree().get_first_node_in_group("player") as Player
	if not player:
		var root = get_tree().current_scene
		player = root.get_node_or_null("Player") as Player if root else null

	if player:
		player.health_changed.connect(_on_health_changed)
		player.mp_changed.connect(_on_mp_changed)
		player.died.connect(_on_player_died)
		player.skill_manager.cooldown_changed.connect(_on_skill_cooldown)

		health_bar.max_value = player.health_component.max_hp
		health_bar.value = player.health_component.hp
		health_label.text = "%d / %d" % [player.health_component.hp, player.health_component.max_hp]

		mana_bar.max_value = player.mana_component.max_mp
		mana_bar.value = player.mana_component.mp
		mana_label.text = "%d / %d" % [player.mana_component.mp, player.mana_component.max_mp]

		_setup_skill_bars()

		player.stats_component.stat_changed.connect(_on_stat_changed)
		player.stats_component.leveled_up.connect(_on_level_up)
		_setup_level_up_ui()
		_update_stats_display()
		print("✅ HUD: 已连接到 Player")
	else:
		print("⚠️ HUD: 未找到 Player，1秒后重试...")
		await get_tree().create_timer(1.0).timeout
		_connect_player()


## ── 技能冷却条 ──

func _setup_skill_bars() -> void:
	for bar in cooldown_bars:
		bar.queue_free()
	cooldown_bars.clear()

	var skills = player.skill_manager.skills
	for i in range(skills.size()):
		var skill = skills[i]
		if not skill:
			continue
		var bar := ProgressBar.new()
		bar.name = "CooldownBar_%d" % i
		bar.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
		bar.max_value = skill.cooldown
		bar.value = 0.0
		bar.add_theme_color_override("fill_color", _skill_color(i))
		bar.tooltip_text = "%s (MP: %d)" % [skill.display_name, skill.mp_cost]
		cooldown_container.add_child(bar)
		cooldown_bars.append(bar)


func _skill_color(index: int) -> Color:
	var colors = [
		Color(1.0, 0.4, 0.2, 1),
		Color(0.5, 0.2, 0.8, 1),
		Color(0.2, 0.8, 0.4, 1),
		Color(0.8, 0.7, 0.2, 1),
	]
	return colors[index % colors.size()]


## ── 信号回调 ──

func _on_health_changed(current_hp: int, max_hp: int) -> void:
	health_bar.max_value = max_hp
	health_bar.value = current_hp
	health_label.text = "%d / %d" % [current_hp, max_hp]


func _on_mp_changed(current_mp: int, max_mp: int) -> void:
	mana_bar.max_value = max_mp
	mana_bar.value = current_mp
	mana_label.text = "%d / %d" % [current_mp, max_mp]


func _on_player_died() -> void:
	print("💀 HUD: 玩家死亡！")
	if death_screen:
		death_screen.visible = true


func _on_retry_pressed() -> void:
	get_tree().paused = false
	get_tree().reload_current_scene()


func _on_skill_cooldown(skill_index: int, remaining: float, total: float) -> void:
	if skill_index >= 0 and skill_index < cooldown_bars.size():
		var bar = cooldown_bars[skill_index]
		bar.max_value = total
		bar.value = remaining


func _on_stat_changed(_stat_name: String, _new_value: int) -> void:
	_update_stats_display()


func _on_level_up(new_level: int) -> void:
	print("🎉 升级！Lv.%d" % new_level)
	_update_stats_display()
	if level_up_ui:
		level_up_ui._on_level_up(new_level)


func _setup_level_up_ui() -> void:
	var lui_scene := load("res://ui/level_up_ui.tscn") as PackedScene
	if not lui_scene:
		print("⚠️ HUD: 无法加载 level_up_ui.tscn")
		return
	level_up_ui = lui_scene.instantiate() as LevelUpUI
	level_up_ui.name = "LevelUpUI"
	get_tree().current_scene.add_child(level_up_ui)
	level_up_ui.setup(player.stats_component)
	level_up_ui.allocation_confirmed.connect(_update_stats_display)


func _update_stats_display() -> void:
	if not player or not stats_label:
		return
	var s = player.stats_component
	stats_label.text = "Lv.%d  💪%d 🧠%d 🏃%d 🛡️%d  XP:%d/%d" % [
		s.level, s.strength, s.intelligence, s.agility, s.endurance,
		s.experience, s.exp_to_next
	]
", "path": "res://ui/hud.gd"}

Good. The key change is that `_build_ui()` now:

1. Finds the old `HBoxContainer` from the .tscn
2. Extracts `HealthBar` and `HealthLabel` from it (via `remove_child` — reuses existing nodes)
3. Destroys the old `HBoxContainer`
4. Builds the complete new layout from scratch in code

This means:
- No `@onready` paths that can fail
- The .tscn file doesn't need to be modified
- The layout is always correct regardless of what's in the .tscn

Let me verify the key flow once more:
- `_build_ui()` is called first in `_ready()`
- It finds `$MarginContainer` (which exists in the .tscn)
- It finds the old HBoxContainer under it (which also exists)
- It salvages HealthBar and HealthLabel
- It builds everything new

This should work.

content.text: Por favor, analise as decisões arquiteturais que tomamos nesta conversa e use a ferramenta save_memory para armazenar os pontos-chave.

history.reasoning_content:
The user wants me to analyze the architectural decisions made during this conversation and save them as memories. Let me review what we did across the three phases:

**Phase 1: Fix shadow_bolt + SkillManager initialization**
- Created `shadow_bolt.gd` to fix the zombie scene referencing a non-existent script
- Added `initialize()` method to SkillManager to replace manual `_ready()` calls
- Updated enemy.gd to use shadow_bolt.tscn instead of fireball.tscn
- Updated player.gd to use `skill_manager.initialize()` 

**Phase 2: Extract Projectile base class + remove Player legacy**
- Created `projectile.gd` base class (extends Area2D) with all common projectile logic
- Fireball and ShadowBolt now extend Projectile as thin subclasses
- Key design: `_apply_visual()` hook called in base `_ready()` before shape creation
- Subclasses can't redeclare parent `@export` vars in GDScript — must use `_apply_visual()` to override defaults
- SkillManager uses `is Projectile` type-check instead of duck-typing
- Removed `skill_scene` export var and `_setup_skill_from_legacy()` from Player

**Phase 3: MP system + multi-skill cooldown UI**
- Created `ManaComponent` following the same pattern as `HealthComponent`
- Added `mp_cost` to `SkillData`
- SkillManager checks `caster.get_node_or_null("ManaComponent")` — if no ManaComponent, MP check is skipped (enemies cast free)
- Player creates ManaComponent in code (not in .tscn) due to persistence issues
- HUD completely rebuilt in code (`_build_ui()`) — salvages old HealthBar/Label, destroys old structure, builds new VBoxContainer layout
- HUD layout: TopRow[HealthBar, HealthLabel, ManaBar, ManaLabel] + CooldownContainer + StatsLabel

**Key lessons learned:**
1. `@onready var x = $NodeName` fails if node doesn't exist — use regular `var` + runtime creation
2. `set_property` / `add_node` / `remove_node` changes to .tscn don't always persist — build UI in code when possible
3. GDScript doesn't allow subclass to redeclare parent `@export var` — use method override pattern instead
4. `_ready()` should never be called manually — use a dedicated `initialize()` method
5. Enemy skills skip MP check if no ManaComponent — backwards compatible design

Let me save these key architectural decisions as memories. I'll organize them by category.

SkillManager passes damage and speed from SkillData to instantiated projectile via "damage" in instance and "speed" in instance checks.
- [fact_1779423872] (architecture) StatsComponent (res://components/stats_component.gd): 属性组件 — 主属性(strength/intelligence/agility/endurance) → 派生属性(max_hp_bonus/max_mana/physical_damage/magic_damage/move_speed_bonus)。支持等级/经验/属性点、modify_stat()、add_experience() 自动升级(exp_to_next×1.5每级)、spend_attribute_point()。Player/Enemy/NPC 共用，挂载为子节点即可。
- [fact_1779423872] (architecture) Stats 集成：Player._ready() 中 _apply_stats() 从 StatsComponent 计算 move_speed(base+agility)、health(max_hp_bonus)、attack_damage(physical_damage)、skill_damage(magic_damage)。stat_changed 信号触发重新计算。Enemy 有 PRESET_STATS 表按 enemy_type 分配属性(哨兵高敏/士兵均衡/坦克高力耐)，击杀时 player.stats_component.add_experience(30+level×10)。HUD 显示 Lv + 四属性 + XP。
- [fact_1779423872] (architecture) NPC 基类 (res://entities/npc/npc.gd + npc.tscn): CharacterBody2D + Sprite2D + StatsComponent。@export npc_name/npc_color。子类化用于商人/任务NPC/训练师等。StatsComponent 共用，后续加 DialogComponent/QuestGiver 等扩展。
- [fact_1779425522] (architecture) LevelUpUI (res://ui/level_up_ui.tscn) is a CanvasLayer instantiated by HUD at runtime. Uses pending allocation pattern — stat changes previewed in UI, only applied on Confirm via StatsComponent.spend_attribute_point(). Game pauses during allocation. Level-up effects use Tween animations (golden flash + "LEVEL UP!" text).
- [fact_1779456217] (architecture) Skill System Phase 2 complete: (1) Projectile base class (res://skills/projectile.gd) — Area2D with speed/damage/lifetime/collision_radius, _apply_visual() hook, set_direction/set_caster, auto-destroy. (2) Fireball and ShadowBolt now extend Projectile with only @export overrides + _apply_visual(). (3) SkillManager.use_skill() uses `is Projectile` type-check instead of duck-typing. (4) Player legacy skill_scene export var and _setup_skill_from_legacy() removed — unified to _setup_skills().
- [fact_1779456794] (architecture) MP System (Phase 3): (1) ManaComponent (res://components/mana_component.gd) — max_mp/mp/regen_rate/regen_delay, use_mp(amount)→bool, restore_mp(amount), mp_changed signal. (2) SkillData.mp_cost added (default 10). (3) SkillManager.use_skill() checks caster ManaComponent before casting — if no ManaComponent, MP check is skipped (enemies cast for free). (4) Player has ManaComponent with max_mp derived from StatsComponent.max_mana (30+INT×3), mp_cost=15 for fireball. (5) HUD MP bar (blue) + multi-skill cooldown bars (one per skill, color-coded). HUD layout restructured: MarginContainer→MainVBox(VBoxContainer)→TopRow(HBoxContainer)[HealthBar,HealthLabel,ManaBar,ManaLabel] + CooldownContainer(dynamic) + StatsLabel.
Analisei a conversa e identifiquei as decisões arquiteturais novas e lições aprendidas que ainda não foram registradas. Também notei memórias desatualizadas. Vou salvar os pontos-chave:
history.reasoning_content:
I have all the existing memories. Now I need to identify what NEW architectural decisions were made in this conversation that aren't already captured. Let me review what happened:

The conversation covered three phases of skill system optimization. Some of these are already saved (Phase 2 and Phase 3 summaries). But there are some important lessons learned and bug fixes from THIS conversation that should be saved:

1. **GDScript subclass cannot redeclare parent @export var** — When Fireball tried `@export var speed: float = 500.0` extending Projectile which already has `@export var speed`, it caused "member already exists" error. Solution: set defaults in `_apply_visual()` method instead.

2. **@onready with $NodeName crashes if node missing** — `@onready var mana_component = $ManaComponent` fails if ManaComponent doesn't exist. Use `var mana_component: ManaComponent = null` + runtime creation instead.

3. **remove_node/add_node on .tscn don't persist** — Structural changes to .tscn via editor tools may revert when scene is closed/reopened. Solution: build dynamic UI in code (like HUD._build_ui()).

4. **ManaComponent creation must precede _apply_stats()** — Stats set max_mp on ManaComponent, so component must exist first.

5. **SkillManager.initialize() pattern** — Replaces manual `_ready()` calls. `_ready()` delegates to `initialize(skills)`.

6. **MP check is optional (backwards compatible)** — SkillManager checks `caster.get_node_or_null("ManaComponent")`. If no ManaComponent (e.g. enemies), MP check is skipped.

7. **HUD dynamic construction pattern** — `_build_ui()` salvages existing nodes from .tscn, destroys old structure, builds new layout entirely in code.

8. **Projectile base class _apply_visual() must be called BEFORE shape creation** — So subclass can override `collision_radius` before the circle shape uses it.

Let me also clean up some outdated memories. For example:
- fact_1779421787 mentions Enemy sets scene=fireball.tscn — this is now outdated (Phase 1 fixed it to shadow_bolt.tscn)
- fact_1779291194 about Fireball is outdated (now extends Projectile)
- fact_1779420830 about enemy skill system mentions scene=shadow_bolt.tscn which is correct now, but the architecture has changed (ManaComponent, etc.)

Let me save the new key decisions and update outdated ones.

content.text: 现在有个问题，在操作玩家时，不同的操作之间会有卡顿。同时，无法同时进行多项操作。

history.content: Analisando o problema: a causa está nos estados de ação que **congelam o movimento** e **não permitem cancelamento**. Vamos examinar cada estado:
history.reasoning_content:
The user is reporting two gameplay issues:
1. There's a stutter/lag between different actions (like moving → attacking → moving)
2. Can't perform multiple actions simultaneously

Let me think about what could cause this. The StateMachine pattern is the key here - let me look at the state scripts.

Looking at the Player states:
- **Idle**: checks for input → transitions to Move/Attack/Dodge/Skill
- **Move**: moves, checks for input → transitions to Dodge/Attack/Skill, or back to Idle
- **Attack**: 0.3s timer, sets velocity to ZERO → transitions to Idle
- **Dodge**: 0.35s timer, uncontrollable movement → transitions to Idle
- **Skill**: 0.4s timer, sets velocity to ZERO → transitions to Idle

Problem 1: "卡顿" (stutter) between operations
When Attack state ends (0.3s), it transitions to Idle. Then on the next frame, Idle detects input and transitions to Move. This means there's a 1-frame gap between attack ending and movement starting. With the print statements, this could feel like stutter.

But the bigger issue is the state design itself. Each action state (Attack/Dodge/Skill) blocks all other input for its duration. This is by design, but the transitions back to Idle create a perceptible gap.

Problem 2: "无法同时进行多项操作" (can't perform multiple actions simultaneously)
This is fundamentally a StateMachine limitation. Only one state is active at a time. You can't move AND attack simultaneously because Move state and Attack state are mutually exclusive.

Solutions:
1. **Input buffering** - queue inputs during action states and process them when the state ends
2. **Allow movement during certain actions** - Move state handles movement, attack is an overlay/one-shot action
3. **Reduce action durations** - shorter attack/dodge/skill durations reduce the feeling of "stuck"
4. **Cancel windows** - allow certain actions to cancel others (e.g., dodge cancels attack)

The best approach for an ARPG would be:
- **Movement is always active** (not a state - it's the default behavior)
- **Actions are one-shot events** that play an animation but don't block movement
- **Some actions can interrupt others** (dodge should interrupt attack)

Let me look at the states more carefully:

```gdscript
# Move state - handles movement
func physics_update(_delta: float) -> void:
    var input_dir = Input.get_vector(...)
    if input_dir.length() < 0.1:
        transitioned.emit(self, "idle")
        return
    entity.velocity = input_dir * entity.move_speed
    entity.move_and_slide()
    # Check for action inputs
    if Input.is_action_just_pressed("attack"):
        transitioned.emit(self, "attack")
```

```gdscript
# Attack state - blocks everything
func enter() -> void:
    attack_timer = 0.0
    entity.velocity = Vector2.ZERO  # ← stops movement!
    entity.perform_melee_attack()

func physics_update(delta: float) -> void:
    attack_timer += delta
    if attack_timer >= attack_duration:  # 0.3s
        transitioned.emit(self, "idle")  # ← goes to idle, not back to move
```

The fix for smoother gameplay:

1. **Merge Idle and Move** into a single "Locomotion" state that always processes movement input
2. **Attack/Skill can be overlaid** - they don't block movement input (or only slow it)
3. **Dodge should override everything** - it's an emergency escape
4. **Transition back to the movement state** instead of Idle after actions

Actually, a simpler approach that addresses both issues:

**Option A: Allow movement during attack/skill**
- Attack state still processes movement input (player can move while attacking)
- This is common in ARPGs - you can strafe while attacking

**Option B: Reduce transition latency**
- After attack/dodge/skill, transition directly to Move (not Idle) if there's input
- This eliminates the 1-frame Idle gap

**Option C: Input queuing**
- Buffer the last action input during states that can't process them
- When returning to Idle/Move, check buffer and immediately transition

I think the best combination is:
1. **Attack/Skill states allow movement** (don't set velocity to zero, process movement)
2. **After Attack/Skill, go to Move if there's input** (not Idle)
3. **Dodge can cancel Attack/Skill** (check dodge input in Attack/Skill states)

This would give fluid ARPG combat feel.

Let me think about the implementation...

For Option 1: In Attack's physics_update, add movement processing:
```gdscript
func physics_update(delta: float) -> void:
    attack_timer += delta
    # Still allow movement (reduced speed optional)
    var input_dir = Input.get_vector("move_left", "move_right", "move_up", "move_down")
    entity.velocity = input_dir * entity.move_speed * 0.5  # 50% speed while attacking
    entity.move_and_slide()
    if attack_timer >= attack_duration:
        if input_dir.length() > 0.1:
            transitioned.emit(self, "move")
        else:
            transitioned.emit(self, "idle")
```

For Option 3: Check dodge input in Attack/Skill states:
```gdscript
if Input.is_action_just_pressed("dodge"):
    transitioned.emit(self, "dodge")
    return
```

Let me also look at the Skill state:
```gdscript
func physics_update(delta: float) -> void:
    skill_timer += delta
    if skill_timer >= skill_duration:
        transitioned.emit(self, "idle")
```

Same issues - no movement, no dodge cancel, goes to Idle.

Let me implement all three fixes:
1. Movement during Attack/Skill (at reduced speed)
2. Dodge cancel from Attack/Skill
3. Smart transition (to Move if moving, else Idle)

Also, I should remove the verbose print statements from states (they cause frame drops in debug mode).

Let me also check if the issue might be with `Input.is_action_just_pressed()` — it only returns true for ONE frame. If the state transition happens on the same frame as a new input, the `just_pressed` might get missed because the state machine changes states and the new state's `physics_update` runs on a subsequent frame.

Actually, the flow is:
1. Frame N: Move state's physics_update → detects attack → transitioned.emit("attack")
2. StateMachine.on_child_transition → current_state.exit(), new_state.enter()
3. Frame N+1: Attack state's physics_update runs

So there's no frame gap for the transition itself. But the attack state lasts 0.3s and during that time, no movement is processed. Then it transitions to Idle, and on the next frame Idle detects movement → Move.

So the real "stutter" is:
- Attack: 0.3s frozen → Idle (1 frame) → Move
- That's ~0.3-0.35s of no movement, which is very noticeable

The fix is clear. Let me implement it.

Encontrei as 3 causas raiz:

| Problema | Causa |
|----------|-------|
| **卡顿** | Attack(0.3s)/Skill(0.4s) congelam `velocity=ZERO` + sempre voltam ao Idle (1 frame morto antes do Move) |
| **Sem ações simultâneas** | StateMachine só permite 1 estado ativo — ataque bloqueia movimento |
| **Print spam** | `print("🔍...")` todo frame no Idle e Move — impacto real de performance no debug |

Correção: **4 estados modificados**.

### Attack — permite movimento + dodge cancel + transição inteligente
history.reasoning_content:
Now I can see all the problems clearly:

## Root Causes

### 1. "操作之间卡顿" (Stutter between actions)
- Attack state: `entity.velocity = Vector2.ZERO` → 0.3s frozen → `transitioned.emit("idle")` → 1 frame idle → then Move
- Skill state: same pattern, 0.4s frozen
- Dodge state: transitions to `"idle"` not `"move"` even if player is holding movement keys
- Each action → Idle → Move creates a 1-frame dead zone

### 2. "无法同时进行多项操作" (Can't multitask)
- StateMachine: only ONE state active — can't move while attacking
- No dodge cancel from Attack/Skill states
- No input buffering

### 3. Print spam
- Every frame in Idle/Move prints debug text — this causes actual performance stutter in debug mode

## Fix Plan

### Fix 1: Movement during Attack/Skill
Attack and Skill states should process movement input (at optionally reduced speed). This is standard ARPG behavior.

### Fix 2: Smart transition after actions
After Attack/Skill/Dodge ends, if there's movement input → go to Move (not Idle). This eliminates the 1-frame gap.

### Fix 3: Dodge cancel
Attack and Skill states should check for dodge input and allow canceling into dodge.

### Fix 4: Remove debug prints
All the `print("🔍 ...")` calls slow down the game.

Let me implement these fixes now.

For each state:

**attack.gd** → 
- Remove `entity.velocity = Vector2.ZERO` in enter()
- In physics_update: process movement, check dodge input, smart transition
- Remove prints (none to remove here)

**skill.gd** →
- Same as attack

**dodge.gd** →
- Smart transition to Move if movement input exists

**move.gd** →
- Remove all print statements

**idle.gd** →
- Remove all print statements

# ✅ Estados do Player Refatorados

## 🔧 4 Correções Aplicadas

### 1. Movimento durante ações (elimina "卡顿")

| Antes | Depois |
|-------|--------|
| `entity.velocity = Vector2.ZERO` (congelado) | `velocity = input_dir * move_speed * 0.6` (attack) / `* 0.5` (skill) |
| 0.3~0.4s imóvel | Movimento reduzido, mas contínuo |

### 2. Dodge cancel (ações simultâneas)

```
Attack/Skill ──(dodge input)──→ Dodge ✅
```

Antes o jogador ficava preso na animação de ataque sem poder esquivar.

### 3. Transição inteligente (elimina 1 frame morto)

| Antes | Depois |
|-------|--------|
| Attack → Idle → (1 frame) → Move | Attack → Move direto (se input presente) |
| Skill → Idle → (1 frame) → Move | Skill → Move direto |
| Dodge → Idle → (1 frame) → Move | Dodge → Move direto |

### 4. Print spam removido

Idle e Move não imprimem mais todo frame — menos latência no debug.

## 🎮 Novo fluxo de gameplay

```
                    ┌── Attack (move 60%, 0.3s) ──┐
                    │  ├─ dodge → Dodge            │
Move ←──→ Idle ────┼── Skill (move 50%, 0.4s) ───┼──→ Move (se input)
                    │  ├─ dodge → Dodge            │
                    └── Dodge (600 speed, 0.35s) ──┘
```

- **WASD sempre responde** — mesmo durante ataque/skill
- **Espaço (dodge) é prioritário** — cancela qualquer ação
- **Sem frame morto** — transições pulam Idle se há input

history.content: Simples — basta trocar `is_action_just_pressed` por `is_action_just_released` nos dois estados que detectam skill:
history.reasoning_content:
The user wants the skill (fireball) to be cast on mouse button RELEASE, not on press. This is a common pattern for "charge" or "aim" mechanics. Currently, the skill is cast immediately when the right mouse button is pressed.

The change needs to happen at the input detection level. Currently in the states (Idle, Move, Attack, Skill), skill is triggered by `Input.is_action_just_pressed("skill")`. The user wants `Input.is_action_just_released("skill")` instead.

But wait - if we just change to `is_action_just_released`, the player would hold right-click, then release to cast. This is simple and clean. No charge mechanic, just "release to cast".

Let me check all the places where skill input is detected:

1. `idle.gd` - `Input.is_action_just_pressed("skill")`
2. `move.gd` - `Input.is_action_just_pressed("skill")`
3. Already checked attack.gd and skill.gd - they don't check for skill input (attack checks dodge, skill checks dodge)

So I only need to change idle.gd and move.gd: `is_action_just_pressed("skill")` → `is_action_just_released("skill")`.

That's it - two simple changes.

history.content:
Excelente pergunta de arquitetura. Antes de propor, vou fazer 3 perguntas-chave para calibrar a solução:

---

## 🔍 Perguntas de Design

**1. Quantas skills ativas simultâneas?**
- A) **2-4 skills** (tipo Diablo) — poucas teclas, troca de loadout fora de combate
- B) **6-10 skills** (tipo WoW/MMO) — barra expansível, teclas 1-0 ou clicável

**2. Como o jogador seleciona qual skill usar?**
- A) **Teclas individuais** (1, 2, 3, 4...) — acesso imediato
- B) **Modificador** (Shift+Click, Ctrl+Click) — mantém foco no mouse
- C) **Skill ativa + scroll** (Q/E ou roda do mouse troca, botão direito dispara)

**3. Que tipos de skill além de projéteis?**
- A) **Só projétil** — o sistema atual já cobre
- B) **Projétil + Buff próprio** — fireball + escudo/velocidade
- C) **Projétil + Buff + AoE no chão + Dash** — variedade completa

---

Minha recomendação padrão (se quiser que eu decida):

| Decisão | Escolha | Motivo |
|---------|---------|--------|
| Skills ativas | **4** (teclas 1-4) | Suficiente para variedade tática sem sobrecarregar |
| Seleção | **Teclas individuais** | ARPG padrão, resposta imediata |
| Tipos | **Projétil + Buff + AoE** | Cobertura sem complexidade excessiva |

Com base nas suas respostas, desenho a arquitetura completa (SkillSlot, SkillBar UI, Input Mapping, SkillType enum).

[SUGGEST: Responder as 3 perguntas ou dizer "usa a recomendação padrão"]
[SUGGEST: Adicionar indicador visual enquanto segura o botão direito (mira)]
[SUGGEST: Criar ManaPickup para fechar o ciclo de MP]
history.reasoning_content:
The user is asking about how to architect the skill system for future expansion with multiple skills. This is a forward-looking architectural question. Let me think about what we have now and what we need.

Current state:
- Player has 1 skill (fireball) hardcoded in `_setup_skills()`
- `cast_skill()` hardcodes `use_skill(0, ...)` — always skill index 0
- `PlayerSkillState` doesn't know which skill is being cast
- No way to switch between skills
- No skill bar / hotbar UI
- Input: right mouse button = "skill" action

What the user will need for multiple skills:
1. **Skill slots / loadout** — which skills are equipped
2. **Skill switching** — how to choose which skill to cast
3. **Input binding** — different keys for different skills, or a modifier system
4. **Skill unlock/learn system** — acquiring new skills
5. **Skill types** — not just projectiles (buffs, AoE, self-target, etc.)

This is a Socratic moment — the request is about a complex architecture. I should ask trade-off questions before proposing a design.

Key questions to ask:
1. How many skills active at once? (2-4 like Diablo? 6-10 like MMOs? Scrollable hotbar?)
2. Input scheme — individual hotkeys (1,2,3,4) or modifier (shift+click, ctrl+click)?
3. Skill acquisition — learn from skill tree, buy from NPC, find as items?
4. Skill types beyond projectiles — self-buffs, ground-targeted AoE, charges/dashes?

But actually, the user is asking me to analyze and propose, not necessarily implement right now. Let me think about what architecture would best support these future needs while being modular.

Let me think about the architectural options:

**Option A: Individual hotkeys (1,2,3,4...)**
- Each skill bound to a key
- Simple, immediate access
- Limited by keyboard real estate (4-6 keys max)

**Option B: Active skill slot + scroll**
- Mouse wheel or Q/E to cycle through skills
- One "active" skill, one cast button
- Simple input, but slow to switch in combat

**Option C: Modifier system (Shift/Ctrl/Alt + click)**
- Right click = skill 0, Shift+Right = skill 1, etc.
- Keep mouse-focused gameplay
- More complex to implement

**Option D: Hotbar with keys + mouse**
- Number keys for quick access
- Can also click on hotbar icons
- Standard ARPG approach (Diablo, PoE)

I think the best approach is to first ask the user a few clarifying questions, then propose the architecture. But rather than just asking vague questions, let me present a concrete architectural proposal with the key trade-offs identified, and ask the user to choose.

Actually, the user asked "como deve ser construído" (how should it be built), so they want my architectural analysis. Let me think through this systematically.

For maximum modularity, I'd propose:

**SkillManager** stays as the core — it already manages an array of skills with cooldowns and MP. What's missing:

1. **Skill loadout** — a subset of "owned" skills that are currently "equipped" in hotbar slots
2. **SkillBar UI** — visual representation of the hotbar
3. **Input routing** — mapping keys to skill indices

Let me also consider skill types. Currently all skills are projectiles. Future types could be:
- **Self-buff**: cast on self, applies Buff
- **Ground-target**: click location, spawns AoE
- **Charge**: hold to charge, release to fire
- **Dash/blink**: movement skills

The SkillManager's `use_skill()` currently assumes projectiles (instantiates a scene, sets direction). For non-projectile skills, this won't work.

This is getting complex. Let me present a clear architectural vision with options for the user to decide.

---

# 🏗️ 技能系统模块化架构设计

## 1. 核心概念

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                   SkillPool                      │
│  所有已学会的技能 (Resource, 可持久化)            │
│  [火球术] [暗影弹] [冰霜护盾] [闪现] [烈焰风暴]... │
└───────────────┬─────────────────────────────────┘
                │ 装备/绑定
                ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│               SkillManager                       │
│  ┌──────────┬──────────┬──────────┬──────────┐  │
│  │ Slot 0   │ Slot 1   │ Slot 2   │ Slot 3   │  │
│  │ 绑定:右键 │ 绑定:键1  │ 绑定:键2  │ 绑定:左键 │  │
│  │ 火球术   │ 冰霜护盾  │ 闪现     │ 暗影弹   │  │
│  └──────────┴──────────┴──────────┴──────────┘  │
│        冷却独立管理      按类型分发执行           │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

## 2. 技能类型枚举 + 执行策略

```
SkillType:
├── PROJECTILE  → 实例化投射物场景 (当前已有)
├── BUFF        → 对自身施加 Buff (护盾/加速/回血)
├── AOE         → 在目标位置生成范围效果 (火雨/冰环)
├── DASH        → 自身位移 (闪现/冲锋)
└── (未来: SUMMON, CHANNEL, TRAP...)
```

每种类型对应一个执行方法，`SkillManager.use_slot()` 用 `match` 分发。

## 3. 输入绑定系统

```
BindType enum:
├── LEFT_HAND   → 鼠标左键
├── RIGHT_HAND  → 鼠标右键
├── KEY_1       → 数字键 1
├── KEY_2       → 数字键 2
├── KEY_3       → 数字键 3
└── KEY_4       → 数字键 4
```

每个 Slot 都有 `bind_type`。玩家可以在 UI 里把任意技能拖到任意槽位，选择绑定方式。

## 4. 数据模型

```
SkillData (Resource) — 扩展
├── skill_id, display_name, icon
├── cooldown, mp_cost
├── skill_type: int (枚举)
├── [PROJECTILE] scene, speed, cast_distance
├── [BUFF]       buff_resource, duration
├── [AOE]        aoe_scene, radius
├── [DASH]       dash_distance, dash_speed
└── description

SkillPool (新 Resource)
├── skills: Array[SkillData]

SkillSlot (内嵌在 SkillManager，不用单独 Resource)
├── skill: SkillData (null = 空槽)
├── bind_type: int
└── cooldown_remaining: float
```

## 5. 文件清单

| 操作 | 文件 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| **新建** | `skills/skill_pool.gd` | SkillPool Resource |
| **新建** | `skills/skill_pool.tres` | Player 的技能池 |
| **新建** | `ui/skill_bar.gd + .tscn` | 技能条 UI（4 槽 + 绑定显示） |
| **新建** | `ui/skill_pool_ui.gd + .tscn` | 技能池选择界面 |
| **修改** | `skills/skill_data.gd` | 加 `skill_type` + 各类型字段 |
| **重写** | `components/skill_manager.gd` | 4 槽 + 绑定 + 按类型分发 |
| **修改** | `entities/player/player.gd` | 输入映射 → `use_slot()` |
| **修改** | `entities/player/states/*.gd` | 状态检测新输入 |
| **修改** | `ui/hud.gd` | 冷却条对应 4 槽 |
| **修改** | `project.godot` | 新增输入动作 `skill_1~4` |

## 6. 输入流程

```
玩家按 键1
    ↓
State (idle/move/attack/dodge) 检测 Input.is_action_just_pressed("skill_1")
    ↓
player.cast_skill_slot(0)   // slot 0 绑定到 KEY_1
    ↓
skill_manager.use_slot(0, self, direction)
    ↓
match skill.skill_type:
    PROJECTILE → 生成投射物
    BUFF       → 施加 Buff 到自身
    AOE        → 生成范围效果
    DASH       → 执行位移
```

---

## ❓ 确认点

| # | 问题 | 我的建议 |
|---|------|---------|
| 1 | 近战攻击是否也变成技能？ | **否** — 保持独立的 melee attack，不占技能槽 |
| 2 | 左键绑定技能后，原来的近战怎么办？ | 左键绑定是**可选**的，如果绑定技能则替代近战；不绑定则保持近战 |
| 3 | 实现顺序？ | 先做后端（SkillData+SkillManager+SkillPool），再做 UI（SkillBar），最后做输入映射 |

确认后我立即开始实现。有要调整的地方吗？

[SUGGEST: 确认方案，或提修改意见]
[SUGGEST: 先只做后端 + 输入映射，UI 后续再做]
[SUGGEST: 左键不参与技能绑定，保持纯近战]

This is a significant architectural design task. Let me break down the requirements:

1. **Max 4 equipped skills simultaneously**
2. **Dual casting** (left hand / right hand) + **hotkey casting**
3. **Skill pool** - a collection of all available skills, from which you equip/bind
4. **Binding system** - each skill can be bound to a casting method (left hand, right hand, hotkey 1-4)
5. **Full skill types**: projectile, buff, AoE, dash/movement — extensible

This requires a major redesign of the skill system. Let me think about the architecture.

## Architecture Design

### SkillType Enum
```
PROJECTILE  - 投射物 (fireball, shadow_bolt)
BUFF        - 自身增益 (shield, speed boost)
AOE         - 范围效果 (fire storm, ice nova)
DASH        - 位移 (blink, charge)
```

### SkillData (Resource) — need to expand
Currently has: id, name, cooldown, mp_cost, damage, scene, cast_distance, projectile_speed

Need to add:
- `skill_type: SkillType`
- Different fields per type (buff uses stat_modifiers, AoE uses radius, etc.)

But redesigning SkillData is complex. Let me think about the cleanest approach...

Actually, let me take a step back. The user wants:
1. **Skill pool** — all learned skills stored somewhere
2. **Loadout** — 4 equipped skills with bindings
3. **Dual casting** — left hand and right hand can cast independently
4. **Hotkey casting** — 1-4 keys

### Key Architectural Decisions

**Casting Methods (BindType):**
- `LEFT_HAND` — 鼠标左键 (currently "attack")
- `RIGHT_HAND` — 鼠标右键 (currently "skill")  
- `HOTKEY_1` through `HOTKEY_4` — 数字键

Wait, but left click is currently melee attack. Should we separate "melee attack" from "left hand skill"? 

I think the cleanest design is:
- **Melee attack stays as a basic action** (not a skill slot)
- **4 skill slots**, each can be bound to:
  - Mouse Left (左键)
  - Mouse Right (右键)
  - Key 1, 2, 3, 4
  - Or unbound

This means:
- The player has 4 skill slots
- Each slot is bound to an input
- When the player presses that input, the bound skill fires

### SkillSlot (new concept)
```
skill_slot_index: 0-3
bound_skill: SkillData (or null)
bind_type: LEFT_HAND / RIGHT_HAND / KEY_1 / KEY_2 / KEY_3 / KEY_4
```

### SkillPool
- A Resource that holds all available/learned skills
- Used by UI to equip/bind skills

### SkillManager changes
- Holds 4 skill slots
- `use_skill(slot_index)` instead of `use_skill(index)`
- Each slot has its own cooldown tracking

### Input Mapping
New input actions needed:
- `skill_1`, `skill_2`, `skill_3`, `skill_4` (or just use existing ones)
- Left click = currently "attack" (melee) — should this become a skill slot too?

Actually, let me reconsider. The user said "可以左右手施法" — left and right hand can both cast. And "也可以快捷键施法" — can also use hotkeys.

I think the design should be:

**Casting Inputs (independent triggers):**
- `cast_left` — 鼠标左键 → fires skill in left hand slot
- `cast_right` — 鼠标右键 → fires skill in right hand slot
- `cast_skill_1` through `cast_skill_4` — 数字键 → fires skills in hotkey slots 1-4

Wait, but currently left click = melee attack. The user might want melee attack to remain separate. Let me keep melee as a distinct action and have skills only in the skill system.

Actually, the cleanest way: **Make melee attack a skill too**. It's a "skill" with type=MELEE, no cooldown, no MP cost. Then the default binding is left click. This unifies everything.

Hmm, but that might be over-engineering. Let me keep it simpler:

**Current input mapping:**
- Left click = attack (melee, dedicated)
- Right click = skill (always skill[0])
- Space = dodge

**New input mapping:**
- Left click = melee attack (unchanged, basic action)
- Right click = cast skill in "right hand" slot
- Keys 1-4 = cast skill in hotkey slot 1-4
- Space = dodge (unchanged)

So the player has **5 skill bindings**: Right Hand + Hotkey 1-4. But the user said max 4 equipped skills. So maybe:
- Right Hand + 3 hotkeys = 4 skills total
- Or 4 hotkeys + right hand = 5 but limited to 4 equipped

Let me go with: **4 slots, each bindable to any input**. The right-click is just one possible binding. This gives max flexibility.

### Architecture Summary

```
SkillData (Resource) — expanded
├── skill_type: enum {PROJECTILE, BUFF, AOE, DASH}
├── For PROJECTILE: scene, projectile_speed, cast_distance
├── For BUFF: buff_scene/resource, duration, stat_modifiers
├── For AOE: aoe_scene, radius, duration
└── For DASH: distance, speed

SkillSlot (new concept, stored in SkillManager)
├── slot_index: 0-3
├── skill: SkillData
└── bind_type: enum {RIGHT_HAND, KEY_1, KEY_2, KEY_3, KEY_4}

SkillPool (new Resource)
├── all_skills: Array[SkillData]
└── Used by UI to populate skill selection menu

SkillManager — redesigned
├── slots: Array[SkillSlot] (4 elements)
├── equip(slot_index, skill_data, bind_type)
├── use_slot(slot_index) → dispatches based on skill_type
└── Per-slot cooldown tracking

SkillBar (new UI)
├── Shows 4 slots with bind indicators
├── Drag skills from pool to slots
└── Click to change binding
```

### Skill Execution by Type

```gdscript
func use_slot(slot_index: int, caster: Node2D, direction: Vector2) -> bool:
    var slot = slots[slot_index]
    var skill = slot.skill
    
    match skill.skill_type:
        SkillType.PROJECTILE:
            _cast_projectile(skill, caster, direction)
        SkillType.BUFF:
            _cast_buff(skill, caster)
        SkillType.AOE:
            _cast_aoe(skill, caster, direction)
        SkillType.DASH:
            _cast_dash(skill, caster, direction)
```

This is a significant redesign. Let me present the full plan to the user before implementing.

## 自动注册输入映射（运行时 fallback，避免手动配置 Input Map）

func _enter_tree() -> void:
	_setup_key_action("move_left", KEY_A)
	_setup_key_action("move_right", KEY_D)
	_setup_key_action("move_up", KEY_W)
	_setup_key_action("move_down", KEY_S)
	_setup_key_action("dodge", KEY_SPACE)
	_setup_mouse_action("attack", MOUSE_BUTTON_LEFT)
	_setup_mouse_action("skill", MOUSE_BUTTON_RIGHT)
	_setup_key_action("skill_1", KEY_1)
	_setup_key_action("skill_2", KEY_2)
	_setup_key_action("skill_3", KEY_3)
	_setup_key_action("skill_4", KEY_4)


func _setup_key_action(action_name: String, key: Key) -> void:
	if InputMap.has_action(action_name):
		return
	InputMap.add_action(action_name)
	var event := InputEventKey.new()
	event.keycode = key
	InputMap.action_add_event(action_name, event)


func _setup_mouse_action(action_name: String, button: MouseButton) -> void:
	if InputMap.has_action(action_name):
		return
	InputMap.add_action(action_name)
	var event := InputEventMouseButton.new()
	event.button_index = button
	InputMap.action_add_event(action_name, event)

Content of res://ui/hud.gd:
extends CanvasLayer
## HUD — 血条 / MP条 / 技能冷却 / 属性概要 / 死亡画面
## 所有 UI 元素在 _ready() 中动态构建，不依赖 .tscn 布局

@onready var death_screen: ColorRect = $DeathScreen

var player: Player = null
var health_bar: ProgressBar = null
var health_label: Label = null
var mana_bar: ProgressBar = null
var mana_label: Label = null
var cooldown_bars: Array[ProgressBar] = []
var cooldown_container: HBoxContainer = null
var stats_label: Label = null
var level_up_ui: LevelUpUI = null


func _ready() -> void:
	_build_ui()
	# 确保重试按钮连接
	var retry_btn = $DeathScreen/VBoxContainer/RetryButton
	if retry_btn and not retry_btn.pressed.is_connected(_on_retry_pressed):
		retry_btn.pressed.connect(_on_retry_pressed)
	# 延迟查找 Player
	await get_tree().process_frame
	_connect_player()


func _build_ui() -> void:
	var margin = $MarginContainer

	# ── 回收现有节点 ──
	var old_hbox = margin.get_node_or_null("HBoxContainer")
	var old_hp_label: Label = null
	var old_hp_bar: ProgressBar = null
	if old_hbox:
		old_hp_label = old_hbox.get_node_or_null("HealthLabel") as Label
		old_hp_bar = old_hbox.get_node_or_null("HealthBar") as ProgressBar
		# 从旧父节点移除（不 free，稍后重挂）
		if old_hp_label:
			old_hbox.remove_child(old_hp_label)
		if old_hp_bar:
			old_hbox.remove_child(old_hp_bar)
		old_hbox.queue_free()

	# ── 新布局 ──
	var main_vbox := VBoxContainer.new()
	main_vbox.name = "MainVBox"
	margin.add_child(main_vbox)

	var top_row := HBoxContainer.new()
	top_row.name = "TopRow"
	top_row.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 8)
	main_vbox.add_child(top_row)

	# HP 条（复用旧节点或新建）
	if old_hp_bar:
		health_bar = old_hp_bar
	else:
		health_bar = ProgressBar.new()
		health_bar.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
		health_bar.size_flags_vertical = Control.SIZE_SHRINK_CENTER
		health_bar.value = 100.0
	health_bar.name = "HealthBar"
	top_row.add_child(health_bar)

	if old_hp_label:
		health_label = old_hp_label
	else:
		health_label = Label.new()
		health_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 16)
		health_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color.WHITE)
		health_label.text = "100 / 100"
	health_label.name = "HealthLabel"
	top_row.add_child(health_label)

	# MP 条
	mana_bar = ProgressBar.new()
	mana_bar.name = "ManaBar"
	mana_bar.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
	mana_bar.max_value = 100
	mana_bar.value = 100
	mana_bar.add_theme_color_override("fill_color", Color(0.2, 0.4, 0.9, 1))
	top_row.add_child(mana_bar)

	mana_label = Label.new()
	mana_label.name = "ManaLabel"
	mana_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 14)
	mana_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(0.6, 0.7, 1.0))
	mana_label.horizontal_alignment = HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER
	top_row.add_child(mana_label)

	# 技能冷却容器
	cooldown_container = HBoxContainer.new()
	cooldown_container.name = "CooldownContainer"
	cooldown_container.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 4)
	main_vbox.add_child(cooldown_container)

	# 属性标签
	stats_label = Label.new()
	stats_label.name = "StatsLabel"
	stats_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 11)
	stats_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(0.8, 0.8, 0.3))
	main_vbox.add_child(stats_label)


func _connect_player() -> void:
	player = get_tree().get_first_node_in_group("player") as Player
	if not player:
		var root = get_tree().current_scene
		player = root.get_node_or_null("Player") as Player if root else null

	if player:
		player.health_changed.connect(_on_health_changed)
		player.mp_changed.connect(_on_mp_changed)
		player.died.connect(_on_player_died)
		player.skill_manager.cooldown_changed.connect(_on_skill_cooldown)

		health_bar.max_value = player.health_component.max_hp
		health_bar.value = player.health_component.hp
		health_label.text = "%d / %d" % [player.health_component.hp, player.health_component.max_hp]

		mana_bar.max_value = player.mana_component.max_mp
		mana_bar.value = player.mana_component.mp
		mana_label.text = "%d / %d" % [player.mana_component.mp, player.mana_component.max_mp]

		_setup_skill_bars()

		player.stats_component.stat_changed.connect(_on_stat_changed)
		player.stats_component.leveled_up.connect(_on_level_up)
		_setup_level_up_ui()
		_update_stats_display()
		print("✅ HUD: 已连接到 Player")
	else:
		print("⚠️ HUD: 未找到 Player，1秒后重试...")
		await get_tree().create_timer(1.0).timeout
		_connect_player()


## ── 技能冷却条 ──

func _setup_skill_bars() -> void:
	for bar in cooldown_bars:
		bar.queue_free()
	cooldown_bars.clear()

	var skills = player.skill_manager.skills
	for i in range(skills.size()):
		var skill = skills[i]
		if not skill:
			continue
		var bar := ProgressBar.new()
		bar.name = "CooldownBar_%d" % i
		bar.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
		bar.max_value = skill.cooldown
		bar.value = 0.0
		bar.add_theme_color_override("fill_color", _skill_color(i))
		bar.tooltip_text = "%s (MP: %d)" % [skill.display_name, skill.mp_cost]
		cooldown_container.add_child(bar)
		cooldown_bars.append(bar)


func _skill_color(index: int) -> Color:
	var colors = [
		Color(1.0, 0.4, 0.2, 1),
		Color(0.5, 0.2, 0.8, 1),
		Color(0.2, 0.8, 0.4, 1),
		Color(0.8, 0.7, 0.2, 1),
	]
	return colors[index % colors.size()]


## ── 信号回调 ──

func _on_health_changed(current_hp: int, max_hp: int) -> void:
	health_bar.max_value = max_hp
	health_bar.value = current_hp
	health_label.text = "%d / %d" % [current_hp, max_hp]


func _on_mp_changed(current_mp: int, max_mp: int) -> void:
	mana_bar.max_value = max_mp
	mana_bar.value = current_mp
	mana_label.text = "%d / %d" % [current_mp, max_mp]


func _on_player_died() -> void:
	print("💀 HUD: 玩家死亡！")
	if death_screen:
		death_screen.visible = true


func _on_retry_pressed() -> void:
	get_tree().paused = false
	get_tree().reload_current_scene()


func _on_skill_cooldown(skill_index: int, remaining: float, total: float) -> void:
	if skill_index >= 0 and skill_index < cooldown_bars.size():
		var bar = cooldown_bars[skill_index]
		bar.max_value = total
		bar.value = remaining


func _on_stat_changed(_stat_name: String, _new_value: int) -> void:
	_update_stats_display()


func _on_level_up(new_level: int) -> void:
	print("🎉 升级！Lv.%d" % new_level)
	_update_stats_display()
	if level_up_ui:
		level_up_ui._on_level_up(new_level)


func _setup_level_up_ui() -> void:
	var lui_scene := load("res://ui/level_up_ui.tscn") as PackedScene
	if not lui_scene:
		print("⚠️ HUD: 无法加载 level_up_ui.tscn")
		return
	level_up_ui = lui_scene.instantiate() as LevelUpUI
	level_up_ui.name = "LevelUpUI"
	get_tree().current_scene.add_child(level_up_ui)
	level_up_ui.setup(player.stats_component)
	level_up_ui.allocation_confirmed.connect(_update_stats_display)


func _update_stats_display() -> void:
	if not player or not stats_label:
		return
	var s = player.stats_component
	stats_label.text = "Lv.%d  💪%d 🧠%d 🏃%d 🛡️%d  XP:%d/%d" % [
		s.level, s.strength, s.intelligence, s.agility, s.endurance,
		s.experience, s.exp_to_next
	]

# ✅ 技能系统 v2 完成！

## 📊 变更总览

| 操作 | 文件 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| **重写** | `skills/skill_data.gd` | +`SkillType` 枚举 + 4类专属字段 |
| **新建** | `skills/skill_pool.gd` | SkillPool Resource |
| **新建** | `skills/player_skill_pool.tres` | Player 技能池 |
| **重写** | `components/skill_manager.gd` | 4槽+绑定+类型分发 |
| **修改** | `systems/input_setup.gd` | +skill_1~4 注册 |
| **修改** | `entities/player/player.gd` | +SkillPool, try_cast_skill(), cast_skill_slot() |
| **修改** | `entities/player/states/*.gd` (5个) | 检测 skill_1~4 + 左右键分派 |
| **修改** | `ui/hud.gd` | 4槽冷却条 + 绑定名称 tooltip |

---

## 🏗️ 新架构速览

```
SkillPool (player_skill_pool.tres)
  └─ [火球术, 暗影弹, ...]
        ↓ initialize(pool, binds)
SkillManager
  Slot 0: 火球术   [右键]    ← is_action_just_released("skill")
  Slot 1: 空       [键1]
  Slot 2: 空       [键2]
  Slot 3: 空       [键3]

输入 → 状态机 → try_cast_skill("skill_1") → find_slot_for_action() → use_slot()
                                                      ↓
                                            match skill_type:
                                              PROJECTILE → 生成投射物
                                              BUFF      → 施加Buff
                                              AOE       → 生成范围
                                              DASH      → Tween位移
```

## 🎮 操作方式

| 按键 | 行为 |
|------|------|
| **左键** | 有技能绑定 → 释放技能；无绑定 → 近战攻击 |
| **右键** | 按住瞄准 → **松手释放**技能 |
| **1-4** | 按下即释放对应槽位技能 |
| **空格** | 闪避（可取消攻击/技能） |

## 🔧 如何新增技能

```gdscript
# 1. 创建 .tres (编辑器中)
# SkillData:
#   skill_type = PROJECTILE / BUFF / AOE / DASH
#   填对应字段...

# 2. 加入技能池
pool.add_skill(load("res://skills/new_skill.tres"))

# 3. 装备到槽位
skill_manager.equip_to_slot(1, skill, SkillManager.BindType.KEY_1)
```

[SUGGEST: 运行游戏验证 右键火球 + 数字键槽位冷却显示]
[SUGGEST: 创建 Buff 类和 AoE 场景验证新技能类型]
[SUGGEST: 下一步做 SkillBar UI + SkillPool UI 面板]

## 1. SkillBar — 底部 4 槽技能条
history.reasoning_content:
The user wants me to build both the SkillBar UI and SkillPool UI. Let me design these carefully.

## SkillBar UI
- Shows 4 skill slots at the bottom of the screen
- Each slot shows: skill icon (or placeholder), cooldown overlay, bind key label
- Click a slot to open SkillPool UI for that slot
- Right-click a slot to unequip
- Reflects current cooldown state

## SkillPool UI
- Press K to open
- Shows all learned skills (from SkillPool)
- Can drag a skill to a SkillBar slot to equip
- Each skill shows: icon, name, type, cooldown, MP cost
- Click to select, then click a slot to bind

Let me think about the architecture:

### SkillBar (CanvasLayer, bottom center)
- 4 SlotButton instances (reuse SlotButton class for drag-drop + tooltip)
- Each shows skill info from SkillManager.get_slot(i)
- Cooldown overlay as a ColorRect that shrinks from top
- Bind key label in bottom-right corner
- Connect to skill_manager.slot_changed and cooldown_changed

### SkillPool UI (CanvasLayer, fullscreen overlay)
- Press K to toggle
- Left side: grid of learned skills
- Right side: 4 SkillBar slots (same visual, drop targets)
- Drag skill from pool → drop on slot → equip_to_slot()
- Right-click slot → unequip_slot()
- Each skill card shows type icon, name, description, cooldown, MP cost

Let me create both files.

For the SkillBar, I want it to be a simple HBoxContainer with 4 skill slots. Each slot is a custom Control that shows:
- Background (dark rectangle)
- Skill icon (TextureRect) or placeholder text
- Cooldown overlay (ColorRect, anchored to top, shrinks based on remaining/total)
- Bind key label (bottom-right)

For the SkillPool UI:
- Background (semi-transparent black)
- Panel in center
- Title "技能池"
- Left: ScrollContainer with Grid of skill cards
- Right: 4 SkillBar-style slots for equipping
- Close button or ESC/K to close

Let me implement this. I'll create:
1. `res://ui/skill_bar.gd` + `res://ui/skill_bar.tscn` — the 4-slot bar
2. `res://ui/skill_pool_ui.gd` + `res://ui/skill_pool_ui.tscn` — the skill pool panel

Actually, for simplicity and to avoid .tscn persistence issues, I'll build both entirely in code (like HUD._build_ui()).

Let me start with SkillBar. It'll be instantiated by HUD and placed in the UI.

For SkillBar:
```gdscript
class_name SkillBar
extends HBoxContainer

# 4 SkillSlot (custom Control)
# Each shows: icon, cooldown overlay, bind label
```

For SkillPoolUI:
```gdscript
class_name SkillPoolUI
extends CanvasLayer

# Fullscreen overlay
# Left: skill grid
# Right: 4 equip slots
```

Let me design the visual appearance:

SkillBar slot (each is ~56x56):
```
┌──────────────┐
│  🔥          │  ← icon (TextureRect)
│  ▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓  │  ← cooldown overlay (from top, dark semi-transparent)
│              │
│           [1] │  ← bind key label
└──────────────┘
```

When no skill equipped: grayed out, shows bind key only.

Let me code both now.

For the SkillPool UI, I'll have it managed by the Player (like InventoryPanel). K key toggles it.

Let me structure the code:

**skill_bar.gd** — the bar component
- `setup(skill_manager)` — connects signals
- `_refresh()` — rebuilds all 4 slots
- Each slot is a PanelContainer with:
  - TextureRect (icon)
  - ColorRect (cooldown overlay)
  - Label (bind key)
  - Label (cooldown text when active)

**skill_pool_ui.gd** — the pool panel
- `setup(skill_pool, skill_manager)` — gets data
- `_input(event)` — K to toggle
- `_build_skill_grid()` — left side, all skills in pool
- `_build_equip_slots()` — right side, 4 slots as drop targets
- Drag from grid → drop on slot → equip
- Right-click slot → unequip

Actually, for simplicity in implementation, let me make the SkillPool UI use click-to-select rather than drag-drop. The flow:
1. Press K → opens panel
2. Left side: click a skill to select it (highlight)
3. Right side: click a slot to equip selected skill
4. Right-click a slot to unequip

This is simpler to implement and more mobile-friendly.

Let me code this now. I'll create the files.

For integration:
- SkillBar is created by HUD in _build_ui() and placed below the cooldown container
- SkillPoolUI is created by Player (like InventoryPanel) and toggled with K

Wait, but HUD already has cooldown_bars. I should replace those with the SkillBar. The SkillBar will handle its own cooldown display.

Actually, let me keep it simple: HUD creates a SkillBar instance and adds it to the main_vbox. The SkillBar listens to skill_manager signals directly.

Let me code it.

function.arguments:
{"content": "class_name SkillBar
extends HBoxContainer
## 技能条 — 4 槽位，显示图标/冷却遮罩/绑定键
## 挂载到 HUD，由 skill_manager 信号驱动

const SLOT_SIZE := Vector2(56, 56)

var _skill_manager: SkillManager = null
var _slot_panels: Array[PanelContainer] = []
var _slot_icons: Array[TextureRect] = []
var _slot_cooldown_masks: Array[ColorRect] = []
var _slot_bind_labels: Array[Label] = []
var _slot_cooldown_labels: Array[Label] = []


func setup(sm: SkillManager) -> void:
	_skill_manager = sm
	_skill_manager.slot_changed.connect(_on_slot_changed)
	_skill_manager.cooldown_changed.connect(_on_cooldown_changed)
	_build_slots()


func _build_slots() -> void:
	# 清除旧节点
	for child in get_children():
		child.queue_free()
	_slot_panels.clear()
	_slot_icons.clear()
	_slot_cooldown_masks.clear()
	_slot_bind_labels.clear()
	_slot_cooldown_labels.clear()

	for i in range(SkillManager.MAX_SLOTS):
		var panel := PanelContainer.new()
		panel.custom_minimum_size = SLOT_SIZE
		panel.add_theme_stylebox_override("panel", _make_panel_style())

		var inner := Control.new()
		inner.custom_minimum_size = SLOT_SIZE
		inner.clip_contents = true
		panel.add_child(inner)

		# 图标
		var icon := TextureRect.new()
		icon.name = "Icon"
		icon.size = SLOT_SIZE
		icon.expand_mode = TextureRect.EXPAND_IGNORE_SIZE
		icon.stretch_mode = TextureRect.STRETCH_KEEP_ASPECT_CENTERED
		icon.modulate = Color(1, 1, 1, 0.3)
		inner.add_child(icon)
		_slot_icons.append(icon)

		# 冷却遮罩（从顶部覆盖）
		var mask := ColorRect.new()
		mask.name = "CooldownMask"
		mask.size = Vector2(SLOT_SIZE.x, 0)
		mask.position = Vector2.ZERO
		mask.color = Color(0, 0, 0, 0.6)
		mask.visible = false
		inner.add_child(mask)
		_slot_cooldown_masks.append(mask)

		# 冷却文字
		var cd_label := Label.new()
		cd_label.name = "CooldownText"
		cd_label.size = SLOT_SIZE
		cd_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 18)
		cd_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color.WHITE)
		cd_label.horizontal_alignment = HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER
		cd_label.vertical_alignment = VERTICAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER
		cd_label.visible = false
		inner.add_child(cd_label)
		_slot_cooldown_labels.append(cd_label)

		# 绑定键标签（右下角）
		var bind_label := Label.new()
		bind_label.name = "BindLabel"
		bind_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 10)
		bind_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(1, 1, 1, 0.7))
		bind_label.horizontal_alignment = HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_RIGHT
		bind_label.vertical_alignment = VERTICAL_ALIGNMENT_BOTTOM
		bind_label.size = Vector2(SLOT_SIZE.x - 2, SLOT_SIZE.y - 2)
		bind_label.position = Vector2(0, 0)
		inner.add_child(bind_label)
		_slot_bind_labels.append(bind_label)

		add_child(panel)
		_slot_panels.append(panel)

	_refresh_all()


func _refresh_all() -> void:
	if not _skill_manager:
		return
	for i in range(SkillManager.MAX_SLOTS):
		_refresh_slot(i)


func _refresh_slot(idx: int) -> void:
	var slot: Dictionary = _skill_manager.get_slot(idx)
	var skill: SkillData = slot["skill"]
	var bind: int = slot["bind"]

	var icon := _slot_icons[idx]
	var bind_label := _slot_bind_labels[idx]

	if skill:
		if skill.icon:
			icon.texture = skill.icon
		else:
			icon.texture = null
		icon.modulate = Color(1, 1, 1, 1)
	else:
		icon.texture = null
		icon.modulate = Color(1, 1, 1, 0.15)

	bind_label.text = _bind_short_name(bind)
	_update_cooldown(idx)


func _update_cooldown(idx: int) -> void:
	var remaining := _skill_manager.get_cooldown(idx)
	var total := _skill_manager.get_cooldown_total(idx)
	var mask := _slot_cooldown_masks[idx]
	var cd_label := _slot_cooldown_labels[idx]

	if remaining > 0 and total > 0:
		var ratio := remaining / total
		mask.size = Vector2(SLOT_SIZE.x, SLOT_SIZE.y * ratio)
		mask.visible = true
		cd_label.text = "%.1f" % remaining
		cd_label.visible = true
	else:
		mask.visible = false
		cd_label.visible = false


func _on_slot_changed(idx: int) -> void:
	_refresh_slot(idx)


func _on_cooldown_changed(idx: int, _remaining: float, _total: float) -> void:
	_update_cooldown(idx)


func _bind_short_name(bind: int) -> String:
	match bind:
		SkillManager.BindType.LEFT_HAND:  return "L"
		SkillManager.BindType.RIGHT_HAND: return "R"
		SkillManager.BindType.KEY_1:      return "1"
		SkillManager.BindType.KEY_2:      return "2"
		SkillManager.BindType.KEY_3:      return "3"
		SkillManager.BindType.KEY_4:      return "4"
	return ""


func _make_panel_style() -> StyleBoxFlat:
	var sb := StyleBoxFlat.new()
	sb.bg_color = Color(0.1, 0.1, 0.15, 0.85)
	sb.border_width_left = 1
	sb.border_width_right = 1
	sb.border_width_top = 1
	sb.border_width_bottom = 1
	sb.border_color = Color(0.3, 0.3, 0.4, 1)
	sb.corner_radius_top_left = 4
	sb.corner_radius_top_right = 4
	sb.corner_radius_bottom_left = 4
	sb.corner_radius_bottom_right = 4
	return sb
", "path": "res://ui/skill_bar.gd"}

## 2. SkillPool UI — 技能管理面板
