function.arguments:
{"content": "class_name SkillPoolUI
extends CanvasLayer
## 技能池界面 — K 键切换，浏览已学会技能 + 装备到槽位
## 点击左侧技能选中，点击右侧槽位装备，右键槽位卸载

var _skill_pool: SkillPool = null
var _skill_manager: SkillManager = null
var _selected_skill: SkillData = null

var _background: ColorRect = null
var _panel: Panel = null
var _skill_grid: GridContainer = null
var _equip_slots: Array[PanelContainer] = []
var _skill_cards: Dictionary = {}  ## SkillData → PanelContainer
var _title_label: Label = null
var _hint_label: Label = null


func _ready() -> void:
	hide()
	_build_ui()


func _input(event: InputEvent) -> void:
	if event is InputEventKey and event.keycode == KEY_K and event.pressed:
		toggle()


func setup(pool: SkillPool, sm: SkillManager) -> void:
	_skill_pool = pool
	_skill_manager = sm
	sm.slot_changed.connect(_on_slot_changed)


func toggle() -> void:
	if visible:
		close()
	else:
		open()


func open() -> void:
	_refresh_all()
	show()


func close() -> void:
	_selected_skill = null
	hide()


## ── 构建 UI ──

func _build_ui() -> void:
	# 背景
	_background = ColorRect.new()
	_background.color = Color(0, 0, 0, 0.6)
	_background.anchor_right = 1.0
	_background.anchor_bottom = 1.0
	add_child(_background)

	# 主面板
	_panel = Panel.new()
	_panel.anchor_left = 0.15
	_panel.anchor_right = 0.85
	_panel.anchor_top = 0.1
	_panel.anchor_bottom = 0.9
	_panel.add_theme_stylebox_override("panel", _make_panel_bg())
	add_child(_panel)

	# 布局
	var margin := MarginContainer.new()
	margin.anchor_right = 1.0
	margin.anchor_bottom = 1.0
	margin.add_theme_constant_override("margin_left", 16)
	margin.add_theme_constant_override("margin_top", 16)
	margin.add_theme_constant_override("margin_right", 16)
	margin.add_theme_constant_override("margin_bottom", 16)
	_panel.add_child(margin)

	var main_hbox := HBoxContainer.new()
	main_hbox.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 16)
	margin.add_child(main_hbox)

	# ── 左侧：技能网格 ──
	var left_vbox := VBoxContainer.new()
	left_vbox.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
	main_hbox.add_child(left_vbox)

	_title_label = Label.new()
	_title_label.text = "📖 技能池"
	_title_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 22)
	_title_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color.WHITE)
	left_vbox.add_child(_title_label)

	var scroll := ScrollContainer.new()
	scroll.size_flags_vertical = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
	scroll.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
	left_vbox.add_child(scroll)

	_skill_grid = GridContainer.new()
	_skill_grid.columns = 4
	_skill_grid.add_theme_constant_override("h_separation", 8)
	_skill_grid.add_theme_constant_override("v_separation", 8)
	scroll.add_child(_skill_grid)

	_hint_label = Label.new()
	_hint_label.text = "点击技能选中 → 点击右侧槽位装备 | 右键槽位卸载 | K 关闭"
	_hint_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 12)
	_hint_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(0.6, 0.6, 0.6))
	left_vbox.add_child(_hint_label)

	# ── 右侧：装备槽 ──
	var right_vbox := VBoxContainer.new()
	right_vbox.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 8)
	main_hbox.add_child(right_vbox)

	var equip_title := Label.new()
	equip_title.text = "⚔️ 装备槽"
	equip_title.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 18)
	equip_title.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color.WHITE)
	right_vbox.add_child(equip_title)

	for i in range(SkillManager.MAX_SLOTS):
		var slot_panel := _make_equip_slot(i)
		right_vbox.add_child(slot_panel)
		_equip_slots.append(slot_panel)


## ── 装备槽（右侧） ──

func _make_equip_slot(idx: int) -> PanelContainer:
	var panel := PanelContainer.new()
	panel.custom_minimum_size = Vector2(220, 48)
	panel.add_theme_stylebox_override("panel", _make_slot_bg())

	var hbox := HBoxContainer.new()
	hbox.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 8)
	panel.add_child(hbox)

	# 图标
	var icon := TextureRect.new()
	icon.name = "Icon"
	icon.custom_minimum_size = Vector2(32, 32)
	icon.expand_mode = TextureRect.EXPAND_IGNORE_SIZE
	icon.stretch_mode = TextureRect.STRETCH_KEEP_ASPECT_CENTERED
	hbox.add_child(icon)

	# 名称 + 按键
	var info_vbox := VBoxContainer.new()
	info_vbox.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
	hbox.add_child(info_vbox)

	var name_label := Label.new()
	name_label.name = "Name"
	name_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 14)
	name_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color.WHITE)
	name_label.text = "空槽位"
	info_vbox.add_child(name_label)

	var bind_label := Label.new()
	bind_label.name = "Bind"
	bind_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 11)
	bind_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(0.5, 0.5, 0.5))
	info_vbox.add_child(bind_label)

	# 点击装备
	panel.gui_input.connect(_on_equip_slot_clicked.bind(idx))
	panel.mouse_filter = Control.MOUSE_FILTER_STOP

	return panel


func _on_equip_slot_clicked(event: InputEvent, idx: int) -> void:
	if event is InputEventMouseButton:
		if event.button_index == MOUSE_BUTTON_LEFT and event.pressed:
			if _selected_skill and _skill_manager:
				_skill_manager.equip_to_slot(idx, _selected_skill)
				_selected_skill = null
				_refresh_all()
		elif event.button_index == MOUSE_BUTTON_RIGHT and event.pressed:
			if _skill_manager:
				_skill_manager.unequip_slot(idx)
				_refresh_all()


func _on_slot_changed(_idx: int) -> void:
	if visible:
		_refresh_all()


## ── 技能卡片（左侧网格） ──

func _refresh_all() -> void:
	_refresh_grid()
	_refresh_equip_slots()


func _refresh_grid() -> void:
	# 清除旧卡片
	for child in _skill_grid.get_children():
		child.queue_free()
	_skill_cards.clear()

	if not _skill_pool:
		return

	for skill in _skill_pool.skills:
		if not skill:
			continue
		var card := _make_skill_card(skill)
		_skill_grid.add_child(card)
		_skill_cards[skill] = card


func _make_skill_card(skill: SkillData) -> PanelContainer:
	var card := PanelContainer.new()
	card.custom_minimum_size = Vector2(100, 120)
	card.add_theme_stylebox_override("panel", _make_card_bg(skill == _selected_skill))

	var vbox := VBoxContainer.new()
	vbox.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 4)
	card.add_child(vbox)

	# 图标
	var icon := TextureRect.new()
	icon.custom_minimum_size = Vector2(48, 48)
	if skill.icon:
		icon.texture = skill.icon
	icon.expand_mode = TextureRect.EXPAND_IGNORE_SIZE
	icon.stretch_mode = TextureRect.STRETCH_KEEP_ASPECT_CENTERED
	icon.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_SHRINK_CENTER
	vbox.add_child(icon)

	# 名称
	var name_label := Label.new()
	name_label.text = skill.display_name
	name_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 13)
	name_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color.WHITE)
	name_label.horizontal_alignment = HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER
	vbox.add_child(name_label)

	# 类型标签
	var type_label := Label.new()
	type_label.text = _type_name(skill.skill_type)
	type_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 10)
	type_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", _type_color(skill.skill_type))
	type_label.horizontal_alignment = HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER
	vbox.add_child(type_label)

	# 信息
	var info_label := Label.new()
	info_label.text = "CD:%.1fs MP:%d" % [skill.cooldown, skill.mp_cost]
	info_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 10)
	info_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(0.6, 0.6, 0.6))
	info_label.horizontal_alignment = HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER
	vbox.add_child(info_label)

	# 点击
	card.gui_input.connect(_on_skill_card_clicked.bind(skill))
	card.mouse_filter = Control.MOUSE_FILTER_STOP

	return card


func _on_skill_card_clicked(event: InputEvent, skill: SkillData) -> void:
	if event is InputEventMouseButton and event.button_index == MOUSE_BUTTON_LEFT and event.pressed:
		_selected_skill = skill
		_refresh_all()


func _refresh_equip_slots() -> void:
	if not _skill_manager:
		return
	for i in range(SkillManager.MAX_SLOTS):
		var panel := _equip_slots[i]
		var slot: Dictionary = _skill_manager.get_slot(i)
		var skill: SkillData = slot["skill"]
		var bind: int = slot["bind"]

		var icon := panel.get_node("%s/Icon" % panel.get_child(0).get_path().get_name(0)) as TextureRect
		# Simpler approach: iterate children
		var hbox := panel.get_child(0)
		var tex: TextureRect = hbox.get_node("Icon") as TextureRect
		var name_lbl: Label = hbox.get_node("%s/Name" % hbox.get_child(1).get_path().get_name(0)) as Label

		# Actually, let me use find approach
		tex = null
		name_lbl = null
		var bind_lbl: Label = null
		for child in hbox.get_children():
			if child is TextureRect and child.name == "Icon":
				tex = child as TextureRect
			elif child is VBoxContainer:
				for sub in child.get_children():
					if sub is Label and sub.name == "Name":
						name_lbl = sub as Label
					elif sub is Label and sub.name == "Bind":
						bind_lbl = sub as Label

		if skill:
			if skill.icon:
				tex.texture = skill.icon
				tex.modulate = Color(1, 1, 1, 1)
			else:
				tex.texture = null
				tex.modulate = Color(1, 1, 1, 0.3)
			name_lbl.text = skill.display_name
			bind_lbl.text = "绑定: %s" % _bind_full_name(bind)
		else:
			tex.texture = null
			tex.modulate = Color(1, 1, 1, 0.15)
			name_lbl.text = "空槽位"
			bind_lbl.text = "绑定: %s" % _bind_full_name(bind)

		# 高亮选中的技能是否已装备
		if _selected_skill and skill == _selected_skill:
			panel.add_theme_stylebox_override("panel", _make_slot_bg(Color(0.3, 0.5, 0.3)))
		else:
			panel.add_theme_stylebox_override("panel", _make_slot_bg())


## ── 样式 ──

func _make_panel_bg() -> StyleBoxFlat:
	var sb := StyleBoxFlat.new()
	sb.bg_color = Color(0.08, 0.08, 0.14, 0.95)
	sb.border_width_left = 2
	sb.border_width_right = 2
	sb.border_width_top = 2
	sb.border_width_bottom = 2
	sb.border_color = Color(0.4, 0.4, 0.5, 1)
	sb.corner_radius_top_left = 8
	sb.corner_radius_top_right = 8
	sb.corner_radius_bottom_left = 8
	sb.corner_radius_bottom_right = 8
	return sb


func _make_card_bg(selected: bool = false) -> StyleBoxFlat:
	var sb := StyleBoxFlat.new()
	sb.bg_color = Color(0.2, 0.3, 0.2, 1) if selected else Color(0.15, 0.15, 0.2, 0.9)
	sb.border_width_left = 1
	sb.border_width_right = 1
	sb.border_width_top = 1
	sb.border_width_bottom = 1
	sb.border_color = Color(0.5, 0.8, 0.5, 1) if selected else Color(0.25, 0.25, 0.35, 1)
	sb.corner_radius_top_left = 4
	sb.corner_radius_top_right = 4
	sb.corner_radius_bottom_left = 4
	sb.corner_radius_bottom_right = 4
	return sb


func _make_slot_bg(color_override := Color(0.12, 0.12, 0.18, 0.9)) -> StyleBoxFlat:
	var sb := StyleBoxFlat.new()
	sb.bg_color = color_override
	sb.border_width_left = 1
	sb.border_width_right = 1
	sb.border_width_top = 1
	sb.border_width_bottom = 1
	sb.border_color = Color(0.3, 0.3, 0.4, 1)
	sb.corner_radius_top_left = 4
	sb.corner_radius_top_right = 4
	sb.corner_radius_bottom_left = 4
	sb.corner_radius_bottom_right = 4
	return sb


## ── 工具 ──

func _type_name(t: int) -> String:
	match t:
		SkillData.SkillType.PROJECTILE: return "🎯 投射物"
		SkillData.SkillType.BUFF:       return "🛡️ 增益"
		SkillData.SkillType.AOE:        return "💥 范围"
		SkillData.SkillType.DASH:       return "💨 位移"
	return "未知"


func _type_color(t: int) -> Color:
	match t:
		SkillData.SkillType.PROJECTILE: return Color(1.0, 0.5, 0.3)
		SkillData.SkillType.BUFF:       return Color(0.3, 0.7, 1.0)
		SkillData.SkillType.AOE:        return Color(1.0, 0.3, 0.3)
		SkillData.SkillType.DASH:       return Color(0.3, 1.0, 0.5)
	return Color.GRAY


func _bind_full_name(bind: int) -> String:
	match bind:
		SkillManager.BindType.LEFT_HAND:  return "左键"
		SkillManager.BindType.RIGHT_HAND: return "右键"
		SkillManager.BindType.KEY_1:      return "键1"
		SkillManager.BindType.KEY_2:      return "键2"
		SkillManager.BindType.KEY_3:      return "键3"
		SkillManager.BindType.KEY_4:      return "键4"
	return "未绑定"

Content of res://ui/hud.gd:
extends CanvasLayer
## HUD — 血条 / MP条 / 技能冷却 / 属性概要 / 死亡画面
## 所有 UI 元素在 _ready() 中动态构建，不依赖 .tscn 布局

@onready var death_screen: ColorRect = $DeathScreen

var player: Player = null
var health_bar: ProgressBar = null
var health_label: Label = null
var mana_bar: ProgressBar = null
var mana_label: Label = null
var cooldown_bars: Array[ProgressBar] = []
var cooldown_container: HBoxContainer = null
var stats_label: Label = null
var level_up_ui: LevelUpUI = null


func _ready() -> void:
	_build_ui()
	# 确保重试按钮连接
	var retry_btn = $DeathScreen/VBoxContainer/RetryButton
	if retry_btn and not retry_btn.pressed.is_connected(_on_retry_pressed):
		retry_btn.pressed.connect(_on_retry_pressed)
	# 延迟查找 Player
	await get_tree().process_frame
	_connect_player()


func _build_ui() -> void:
	var margin = $MarginContainer

	# ── 回收现有节点 ──
	var old_hbox = margin.get_node_or_null("HBoxContainer")
	var old_hp_label: Label = null
	var old_hp_bar: ProgressBar = null
	if old_hbox:
		old_hp_label = old_hbox.get_node_or_null("HealthLabel") as Label
		old_hp_bar = old_hbox.get_node_or_null("HealthBar") as ProgressBar
		# 从旧父节点移除（不 free，稍后重挂）
		if old_hp_label:
			old_hbox.remove_child(old_hp_label)
		if old_hp_bar:
			old_hbox.remove_child(old_hp_bar)
		old_hbox.queue_free()

	# ── 新布局 ──
	var main_vbox := VBoxContainer.new()
	main_vbox.name = "MainVBox"
	margin.add_child(main_vbox)

	var top_row := HBoxContainer.new()
	top_row.name = "TopRow"
	top_row.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 8)
	main_vbox.add_child(top_row)

	# HP 条（复用旧节点或新建）
	if old_hp_bar:
		health_bar = old_hp_bar
	else:
		health_bar = ProgressBar.new()
		health_bar.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
		health_bar.size_flags_vertical = Control.SIZE_SHRINK_CENTER
		health_bar.value = 100.0
	health_bar.name = "HealthBar"
	top_row.add_child(health_bar)

	if old_hp_label:
		health_label = old_hp_label
	else:
		health_label = Label.new()
		health_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 16)
		health_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color.WHITE)
		health_label.text = "100 / 100"
	health_label.name = "HealthLabel"
	top_row.add_child(health_label)

	# MP 条
	mana_bar = ProgressBar.new()
	mana_bar.name = "ManaBar"
	mana_bar.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
	mana_bar.max_value = 100
	mana_bar.value = 100
	mana_bar.add_theme_color_override("fill_color", Color(0.2, 0.4, 0.9, 1))
	top_row.add_child(mana_bar)

	mana_label = Label.new()
	mana_label.name = "ManaLabel"
	mana_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 14)
	mana_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(0.6, 0.7, 1.0))
	mana_label.horizontal_alignment = HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER
	top_row.add_child(mana_label)

	# 技能冷却容器
	cooldown_container = HBoxContainer.new()
	cooldown_container.name = "CooldownContainer"
	cooldown_container.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 4)
	main_vbox.add_child(cooldown_container)

	# 属性标签
	stats_label = Label.new()
	stats_label.name = "StatsLabel"
	stats_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 11)
	stats_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(0.8, 0.8, 0.3))
	main_vbox.add_child(stats_label)


func _connect_player() -> void:
	player = get_tree().get_first_node_in_group("player") as Player
	if not player:
		var root = get_tree().current_scene
		player = root.get_node_or_null("Player") as Player if root else null

	if player:
		player.health_changed.connect(_on_health_changed)
		player.mp_changed.connect(_on_mp_changed)
		player.died.connect(_on_player_died)
		player.skill_manager.cooldown_changed.connect(_on_skill_cooldown)
		player.skill_manager.slot_changed.connect(_on_slot_changed)

		health_bar.max_value = player.health_component.max_hp
		health_bar.value = player.health_component.hp
		health_label.text = "%d / %d" % [player.health_component.hp, player.health_component.max_hp]

		mana_bar.max_value = player.mana_component.max_mp
		mana_bar.value = player.mana_component.mp
		mana_label.text = "%d / %d" % [player.mana_component.mp, player.mana_component.max_mp]

		_setup_skill_bars()

		player.stats_component.stat_changed.connect(_on_stat_changed)
		player.stats_component.leveled_up.connect(_on_level_up)
		_setup_level_up_ui()
		_update_stats_display()
		print("✅ HUD: 已连接到 Player")
	else:
		print("⚠️ HUD: 未找到 Player，1秒后重试...")
		await get_tree().create_timer(1.0).timeout
		_connect_player()


## ── 技能冷却条（4 槽位） ──

func _setup_skill_bars() -> void:
	for bar in cooldown_bars:
		bar.queue_free()
	cooldown_bars.clear()

	for i in range(SkillManager.MAX_SLOTS):
		var slot: Dictionary = player.skill_manager.get_slot(i)
		var skill: SkillData = slot["skill"]
		var bar := ProgressBar.new()
		bar.name = "CooldownBar_%d" % i
		bar.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
		bar.max_value = skill.cooldown if skill else 1.0
		bar.value = 0.0
		bar.add_theme_color_override("fill_color", _skill_color(i))

		if skill:
			var bind_name := _bind_name(slot["bind"])
			bar.tooltip_text = "[%s] %s (MP:%d)" % [bind_name, skill.display_name, skill.mp_cost]
		else:
			bar.tooltip_text = "空槽位"
			bar.modulate = Color(1, 1, 1, 0.3)

		cooldown_container.add_child(bar)
		cooldown_bars.append(bar)


func _bind_name(bind: int) -> String:
	match bind:
		SkillManager.BindType.LEFT_HAND:  return "左键"
		SkillManager.BindType.RIGHT_HAND: return "右键"
		SkillManager.BindType.KEY_1:      return "1"
		SkillManager.BindType.KEY_2:      return "2"
		SkillManager.BindType.KEY_3:      return "3"
		SkillManager.BindType.KEY_4:      return "4"
	return "?"


func _skill_color(index: int) -> Color:
	var colors = [
		Color(1.0, 0.4, 0.2, 1),
		Color(0.5, 0.2, 0.8, 1),
		Color(0.2, 0.8, 0.4, 1),
		Color(0.8, 0.7, 0.2, 1),
	]
	return colors[index % colors.size()]


## ── 信号回调 ──

func _on_health_changed(current_hp: int, max_hp: int) -> void:
	health_bar.max_value = max_hp
	health_bar.value = current_hp
	health_label.text = "%d / %d" % [current_hp, max_hp]


func _on_mp_changed(current_mp: int, max_mp: int) -> void:
	mana_bar.max_value = max_mp
	mana_bar.value = current_mp
	mana_label.text = "%d / %d" % [current_mp, max_mp]


func _on_player_died() -> void:
	print("💀 HUD: 玩家死亡！")
	if death_screen:
		death_screen.visible = true


func _on_retry_pressed() -> void:
	get_tree().paused = false
	get_tree().reload_current_scene()


func _on_skill_cooldown(skill_index: int, remaining: float, total: float) -> void:
	if skill_index >= 0 and skill_index < cooldown_bars.size():
		var bar = cooldown_bars[skill_index]
		bar.max_value = total
		bar.value = remaining


func _on_slot_changed(_slot_index: int) -> void:
	_setup_skill_bars()


func _on_stat_changed(_stat_name: String, _new_value: int) -> void:
	_update_stats_display()


func _on_level_up(new_level: int) -> void:
	print("🎉 升级！Lv.%d" % new_level)
	_update_stats_display()
	if level_up_ui:
		level_up_ui._on_level_up(new_level)


func _setup_level_up_ui() -> void:
	var lui_scene := load("res://ui/level_up_ui.tscn") as PackedScene
	if not lui_scene:
		print("⚠️ HUD: 无法加载 level_up_ui.tscn")
		return
	level_up_ui = lui_scene.instantiate() as LevelUpUI
	level_up_ui.name = "LevelUpUI"
	get_tree().current_scene.add_child(level_up_ui)
	level_up_ui.setup(player.stats_component)
	level_up_ui.allocation_confirmed.connect(_update_stats_display)


func _update_stats_display() -> void:
	if not player or not stats_label:
		return
	var s = player.stats_component
	stats_label.text = "Lv.%d  💪%d 🧠%d 🏃%d 🛡️%d  XP:%d/%d" % [
		s.level, s.strength, s.intelligence, s.agility, s.endurance,
		s.experience, s.exp_to_next
	]

history.reasoning_content:
The user says they can only equip skills to number key slots (1-4), not to left/right hand slots. Let me look at the SkillPoolUI code.

In `_on_equip_slot_clicked`, it does:
```gdscript
_skill_manager.equip_to_slot(idx, _selected_skill)
```

This equips the skill to the slot but doesn't set the bind type. Looking at `equip_to_slot`:
```gdscript
func equip_to_slot(slot_index: int, skill: SkillData, bind: int = -1) -> void:
    ...
    _slots[slot_index]["bind"] = bind if bind >= 0 else slot_index + 2
```

When `bind` is not passed (default -1), it uses `slot_index + 2`. Since BindType enum is:
- LEFT_HAND = 0
- RIGHT_HAND = 1
- KEY_1 = 2
- KEY_2 = 3
- KEY_3 = 4
- KEY_4 = 5

`slot_index + 2` means:
- Slot 0 → bind = 2 (KEY_1)
- Slot 1 → bind = 3 (KEY_2)
- Slot 2 → bind = 4 (KEY_3)
- Slot 3 → bind = 5 (KEY_4)

So the default binding is always keyboard keys, never LEFT_HAND or RIGHT_HAND!

The fix: The SkillPoolUI needs to let the user choose the bind type when equipping. Options:
1. Add a bind selector dropdown/buttons in the equip slot area
2. Have the equip slot cycle through bind types on click
3. Add separate "equip to left hand" / "equip to right hand" buttons

The simplest UX: each equip slot shows a small bind indicator that can be clicked to cycle through available binds (LEFT_HAND → RIGHT_HAND → KEY_1 → KEY_2 → KEY_3 → KEY_4).

Actually, an even simpler approach: Left-click equips with the slot's current bind (which defaults to keyboard). Add a right-click or shift-click to cycle the bind type.

Or better yet: each equip slot has a small bind selector label below it that you can click to cycle through binds.

Let me implement this: each equip slot now shows clickable bind options, or adds a cycle mechanism.

Actually, the simplest approach for now: show the current bind in the slot panel, and make clicking the bind label cycle through the options. Let me update the `_make_equip_slot` to make the bind label clickable, cycling through binds.

Let me also update the `_on_equip_slot_clicked` to detect whether the click was on the bind label or the main panel.

Actually, the cleanest approach: Add a small bind selector row with L/R/1/2/3/4 buttons for each slot. But that's complex.

Simpler: Make the bind label respond to right-click to cycle. Left-click still equips/unequips.

Let me modify:
- Left-click slot: equip selected skill
- Right-click bind label area: cycle bind type
- Right-click slot (not on bind): unequip

Wait, I already use right-click on slot to unequip. Let me rethink:

- Left-click slot: equip selected skill  
- Left-click bind label: cycle bind type
- Right-click slot: unequip

This is clean. I'll make the bind label a separate clickable element.

Actually, the simplest approach that works: just cycle the bind when right-clicking an empty slot, and unequip only when right-clicking a filled slot.

Hmm, that's confusing. Let me just add a cycle mechanism to the bind label itself. I'll make it so clicking the bind text cycles through options.

Content of res://ui/skill_pool_ui.gd:
class_name SkillPoolUI
extends CanvasLayer
## 技能池界面 — K 键切换，浏览已学会技能 + 装备到槽位
## 点击左侧技能选中，点击右侧槽位装备，右键槽位卸载

var _skill_pool: SkillPool = null
var _skill_manager: SkillManager = null
var _selected_skill: SkillData = null

var _background: ColorRect = null
var _panel: Panel = null
var _skill_grid: GridContainer = null
var _equip_slots: Array[PanelContainer] = []
var _skill_cards: Dictionary = {}  ## SkillData → PanelContainer
var _title_label: Label = null
var _hint_label: Label = null


func _ready() -> void:
	hide()
	_build_ui()


func _input(event: InputEvent) -> void:
	if event is InputEventKey and event.keycode == KEY_K and event.pressed:
		toggle()


func setup(pool: SkillPool, sm: SkillManager) -> void:
	_skill_pool = pool
	_skill_manager = sm
	sm.slot_changed.connect(_on_slot_changed)


func toggle() -> void:
	if visible:
		close()
	else:
		open()


func open() -> void:
	_refresh_all()
	show()


func close() -> void:
	_selected_skill = null
	hide()


## ── 构建 UI ──

func _build_ui() -> void:
	# 背景
	_background = ColorRect.new()
	_background.color = Color(0, 0, 0, 0.6)
	_background.anchor_right = 1.0
	_background.anchor_bottom = 1.0
	add_child(_background)

	# 主面板
	_panel = Panel.new()
	_panel.anchor_left = 0.15
	_panel.anchor_right = 0.85
	_panel.anchor_top = 0.1
	_panel.anchor_bottom = 0.9
	_panel.add_theme_stylebox_override("panel", _make_panel_bg())
	add_child(_panel)

	# 布局
	var margin := MarginContainer.new()
	margin.anchor_right = 1.0
	margin.anchor_bottom = 1.0
	margin.add_theme_constant_override("margin_left", 16)
	margin.add_theme_constant_override("margin_top", 16)
	margin.add_theme_constant_override("margin_right", 16)
	margin.add_theme_constant_override("margin_bottom", 16)
	_panel.add_child(margin)

	var main_hbox := HBoxContainer.new()
	main_hbox.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 16)
	margin.add_child(main_hbox)

	# ── 左侧：技能网格 ──
	var left_vbox := VBoxContainer.new()
	left_vbox.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
	main_hbox.add_child(left_vbox)

	_title_label = Label.new()
	_title_label.text = "📖 技能池"
	_title_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 22)
	_title_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color.WHITE)
	left_vbox.add_child(_title_label)

	var scroll := ScrollContainer.new()
	scroll.size_flags_vertical = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
	scroll.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
	left_vbox.add_child(scroll)

	_skill_grid = GridContainer.new()
	_skill_grid.columns = 4
	_skill_grid.add_theme_constant_override("h_separation", 8)
	_skill_grid.add_theme_constant_override("v_separation", 8)
	scroll.add_child(_skill_grid)

	_hint_label = Label.new()
	_hint_label.text = "点击技能选中 → 点击右侧槽位装备 | 右键槽位卸载 | K 关闭"
	_hint_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 12)
	_hint_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(0.6, 0.6, 0.6))
	left_vbox.add_child(_hint_label)

	# ── 右侧：装备槽 ──
	var right_vbox := VBoxContainer.new()
	right_vbox.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 8)
	main_hbox.add_child(right_vbox)

	var equip_title := Label.new()
	equip_title.text = "⚔️ 装备槽"
	equip_title.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 18)
	equip_title.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color.WHITE)
	right_vbox.add_child(equip_title)

	for i in range(SkillManager.MAX_SLOTS):
		var slot_panel := _make_equip_slot(i)
		right_vbox.add_child(slot_panel)
		_equip_slots.append(slot_panel)


## ── 装备槽（右侧） ──

func _make_equip_slot(idx: int) -> PanelContainer:
	var panel := PanelContainer.new()
	panel.custom_minimum_size = Vector2(220, 48)
	panel.add_theme_stylebox_override("panel", _make_slot_bg())

	var hbox := HBoxContainer.new()
	hbox.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 8)
	panel.add_child(hbox)

	# 图标
	var icon := TextureRect.new()
	icon.name = "Icon"
	icon.custom_minimum_size = Vector2(32, 32)
	icon.expand_mode = TextureRect.EXPAND_IGNORE_SIZE
	icon.stretch_mode = TextureRect.STRETCH_KEEP_ASPECT_CENTERED
	hbox.add_child(icon)

	# 名称 + 按键
	var info_vbox := VBoxContainer.new()
	info_vbox.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
	hbox.add_child(info_vbox)

	var name_label := Label.new()
	name_label.name = "Name"
	name_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 14)
	name_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color.WHITE)
	name_label.text = "空槽位"
	info_vbox.add_child(name_label)

	var bind_label := Label.new()
	bind_label.name = "Bind"
	bind_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 11)
	bind_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(0.5, 0.5, 0.5))
	info_vbox.add_child(bind_label)

	# 点击装备
	panel.gui_input.connect(_on_equip_slot_clicked.bind(idx))
	panel.mouse_filter = Control.MOUSE_FILTER_STOP

	return panel


func _on_equip_slot_clicked(event: InputEvent, idx: int) -> void:
	if event is InputEventMouseButton:
		if event.button_index == MOUSE_BUTTON_LEFT and event.pressed:
			if _selected_skill and _skill_manager:
				_skill_manager.equip_to_slot(idx, _selected_skill)
				_selected_skill = null
				_refresh_all()
		elif event.button_index == MOUSE_BUTTON_RIGHT and event.pressed:
			if _skill_manager:
				_skill_manager.unequip_slot(idx)
				_refresh_all()


func _on_slot_changed(_idx: int) -> void:
	if visible:
		_refresh_all()


## ── 技能卡片（左侧网格） ──

func _refresh_all() -> void:
	_refresh_grid()
	_refresh_equip_slots()


func _refresh_grid() -> void:
	# 清除旧卡片
	for child in _skill_grid.get_children():
		child.queue_free()
	_skill_cards.clear()

	if not _skill_pool:
		return

	for skill in _skill_pool.skills:
		if not skill:
			continue
		var card := _make_skill_card(skill)
		_skill_grid.add_child(card)
		_skill_cards[skill] = card


func _make_skill_card(skill: SkillData) -> PanelContainer:
	var card := PanelContainer.new()
	card.custom_minimum_size = Vector2(100, 120)
	card.add_theme_stylebox_override("panel", _make_card_bg(skill == _selected_skill))

	var vbox := VBoxContainer.new()
	vbox.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 4)
	card.add_child(vbox)

	# 图标
	var icon := TextureRect.new()
	icon.custom_minimum_size = Vector2(48, 48)
	if skill.icon:
		icon.texture = skill.icon
	icon.expand_mode = TextureRect.EXPAND_IGNORE_SIZE
	icon.stretch_mode = TextureRect.STRETCH_KEEP_ASPECT_CENTERED
	icon.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_SHRINK_CENTER
	vbox.add_child(icon)

	# 名称
	var name_label := Label.new()
	name_label.text = skill.display_name
	name_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 13)
	name_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color.WHITE)
	name_label.horizontal_alignment = HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER
	vbox.add_child(name_label)

	# 类型标签
	var type_label := Label.new()
	type_label.text = _type_name(skill.skill_type)
	type_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 10)
	type_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", _type_color(skill.skill_type))
	type_label.horizontal_alignment = HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER
	vbox.add_child(type_label)

	# 信息
	var info_label := Label.new()
	info_label.text = "CD:%.1fs MP:%d" % [skill.cooldown, skill.mp_cost]
	info_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 10)
	info_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(0.6, 0.6, 0.6))
	info_label.horizontal_alignment = HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER
	vbox.add_child(info_label)

	# 点击
	card.gui_input.connect(_on_skill_card_clicked.bind(skill))
	card.mouse_filter = Control.MOUSE_FILTER_STOP

	return card


func _on_skill_card_clicked(event: InputEvent, skill: SkillData) -> void:
	if event is InputEventMouseButton and event.button_index == MOUSE_BUTTON_LEFT and event.pressed:
		_selected_skill = skill
		_refresh_all()


func _refresh_equip_slots() -> void:
	if not _skill_manager:
		return
	for i in range(SkillManager.MAX_SLOTS):
		var panel := _equip_slots[i]
		var slot: Dictionary = _skill_manager.get_slot(i)
		var skill: SkillData = slot["skill"]
		var bind: int = slot["bind"]

		var hbox := panel.get_child(0) as HBoxContainer
		var tex := hbox.get_node("Icon") as TextureRect
		var vbox := hbox.get_child(1) as VBoxContainer
		var name_lbl := vbox.get_node("Name") as Label
		var bind_lbl := vbox.get_node("Bind") as Label

		if skill:
			if skill.icon:
				tex.texture = skill.icon
				tex.modulate = Color(1, 1, 1, 1)
			else:
				tex.texture = null
				tex.modulate = Color(1, 1, 1, 0.3)
			name_lbl.text = skill.display_name
		else:
			tex.texture = null
			tex.modulate = Color(1, 1, 1, 0.15)
			name_lbl.text = "空槽位"

		bind_lbl.text = "绑定: %s" % _bind_full_name(bind)

		# 高亮已选中的技能
		if _selected_skill and skill == _selected_skill:
			panel.add_theme_stylebox_override("panel", _make_slot_bg(Color(0.3, 0.5, 0.3)))
		else:
			panel.add_theme_stylebox_override("panel", _make_slot_bg())


## ── 样式 ──

func _make_panel_bg() -> StyleBoxFlat:
	var sb := StyleBoxFlat.new()
	sb.bg_color = Color(0.08, 0.08, 0.14, 0.95)
	sb.border_width_left = 2
	sb.border_width_right = 2
	sb.border_width_top = 2
	sb.border_width_bottom = 2
	sb.border_color = Color(0.4, 0.4, 0.5, 1)
	sb.corner_radius_top_left = 8
	sb.corner_radius_top_right = 8
	sb.corner_radius_bottom_left = 8
	sb.corner_radius_bottom_right = 8
	return sb


func _make_card_bg(selected: bool = false) -> StyleBoxFlat:
	var sb := StyleBoxFlat.new()
	sb.bg_color = Color(0.2, 0.3, 0.2, 1) if selected else Color(0.15, 0.15, 0.2, 0.9)
	sb.border_width_left = 1
	sb.border_width_right = 1
	sb.border_width_top = 1
	sb.border_width_bottom = 1
	sb.border_color = Color(0.5, 0.8, 0.5, 1) if selected else Color(0.25, 0.25, 0.35, 1)
	sb.corner_radius_top_left = 4
	sb.corner_radius_top_right = 4
	sb.corner_radius_bottom_left = 4
	sb.corner_radius_bottom_right = 4
	return sb


func _make_slot_bg(color_override := Color(0.12, 0.12, 0.18, 0.9)) -> StyleBoxFlat:
	var sb := StyleBoxFlat.new()
	sb.bg_color = color_override
	sb.border_width_left = 1
	sb.border_width_right = 1
	sb.border_width_top = 1
	sb.border_width_bottom = 1
	sb.border_color = Color(0.3, 0.3, 0.4, 1)
	sb.corner_radius_top_left = 4
	sb.corner_radius_top_right = 4
	sb.corner_radius_bottom_left = 4
	sb.corner_radius_bottom_right = 4
	return sb


## ── 工具 ──

func _type_name(t: int) -> String:
	match t:
		SkillData.SkillType.PROJECTILE: return "🎯 投射物"
		SkillData.SkillType.BUFF:       return "🛡️ 增益"
		SkillData.SkillType.AOE:        return "💥 范围"
		SkillData.SkillType.DASH:       return "💨 位移"
	return "未知"


func _type_color(t: int) -> Color:
	match t:
		SkillData.SkillType.PROJECTILE: return Color(1.0, 0.5, 0.3)
		SkillData.SkillType.BUFF:       return Color(0.3, 0.7, 1.0)
		SkillData.SkillType.AOE:        return Color(1.0, 0.3, 0.3)
		SkillData.SkillType.DASH:       return Color(0.3, 1.0, 0.5)
	return Color.GRAY


func _bind_full_name(bind: int) -> String:
	match bind:
		SkillManager.BindType.LEFT_HAND:  return "左键"
		SkillManager.BindType.RIGHT_HAND: return "右键"
		SkillManager.BindType.KEY_1:      return "键1"
		SkillManager.BindType.KEY_2:      return "键2"
		SkillManager.BindType.KEY_3:      return "键3"
		SkillManager.BindType.KEY_4:      return "键4"
	return "未绑定"
需要给每个槽位加绑定切换。修改 `_make_equip_slot` 让绑定标签可点击循环：
history.reasoning_content:
Three changes needed in SkillPoolUI:

1. **Left-click slot** → equip with the SLOT'S CURRENT bind (which defaults to key number when created via equip_to_slot without bind specified). But the issue is that equip_to_slot defaults to slot_index+2 which maps to KEY_1..KEY_4.

2. **Add bind cycling** → clicking the bind label cycles through: 右键 → 左键 → 键1 → 键2 → 键3 → 键4 (the natural order for ARPG).

3. The bind label needs to be clickable. Currently only the panel has gui_input connected.

Let me:
- Make the bind label a separate clickable element via `bind_label.gui_input`
- On click, cycle to the next bind
- Update the hint text to explain bind cycling

Also, I should change the default equip behavior: when equipping via left-click on the slot, use the slot's current bind (which can now be changed by clicking the bind label).

Let me also add bind cycling buttons (◀ ▶) around the bind label for clarity.

Actually, the simplest UX: make the bind label clickable to cycle binds. Let me implement this.

Content of res://ui/skill_pool_ui.gd:
class_name SkillPoolUI
extends CanvasLayer
## 技能池界面 — K 键切换，浏览已学会技能 + 装备到槽位
## 点击左侧技能选中，点击右侧槽位装备，右键槽位卸载

var _skill_pool: SkillPool = null
var _skill_manager: SkillManager = null
var _selected_skill: SkillData = null

var _background: ColorRect = null
var _panel: Panel = null
var _skill_grid: GridContainer = null
var _equip_slots: Array[PanelContainer] = []
var _skill_cards: Dictionary = {}  ## SkillData → PanelContainer
var _title_label: Label = null
var _hint_label: Label = null


func _ready() -> void:
	hide()
	_build_ui()


func _input(event: InputEvent) -> void:
	if event is InputEventKey and event.keycode == KEY_K and event.pressed:
		toggle()


func setup(pool: SkillPool, sm: SkillManager) -> void:
	_skill_pool = pool
	_skill_manager = sm
	sm.slot_changed.connect(_on_slot_changed)


func toggle() -> void:
	if visible:
		close()
	else:
		open()


func open() -> void:
	_refresh_all()
	show()


func close() -> void:
	_selected_skill = null
	hide()


## ── 构建 UI ──

func _build_ui() -> void:
	# 背景
	_background = ColorRect.new()
	_background.color = Color(0, 0, 0, 0.6)
	_background.anchor_right = 1.0
	_background.anchor_bottom = 1.0
	add_child(_background)

	# 主面板
	_panel = Panel.new()
	_panel.anchor_left = 0.15
	_panel.anchor_right = 0.85
	_panel.anchor_top = 0.1
	_panel.anchor_bottom = 0.9
	_panel.add_theme_stylebox_override("panel", _make_panel_bg())
	add_child(_panel)

	# 布局
	var margin := MarginContainer.new()
	margin.anchor_right = 1.0
	margin.anchor_bottom = 1.0
	margin.add_theme_constant_override("margin_left", 16)
	margin.add_theme_constant_override("margin_top", 16)
	margin.add_theme_constant_override("margin_right", 16)
	margin.add_theme_constant_override("margin_bottom", 16)
	_panel.add_child(margin)

	var main_hbox := HBoxContainer.new()
	main_hbox.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 16)
	margin.add_child(main_hbox)

	# ── 左侧：技能网格 ──
	var left_vbox := VBoxContainer.new()
	left_vbox.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
	main_hbox.add_child(left_vbox)

	_title_label = Label.new()
	_title_label.text = "📖 技能池"
	_title_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 22)
	_title_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color.WHITE)
	left_vbox.add_child(_title_label)

	var scroll := ScrollContainer.new()
	scroll.size_flags_vertical = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
	scroll.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
	left_vbox.add_child(scroll)

	_skill_grid = GridContainer.new()
	_skill_grid.columns = 4
	_skill_grid.add_theme_constant_override("h_separation", 8)
	_skill_grid.add_theme_constant_override("v_separation", 8)
	scroll.add_child(_skill_grid)

	_hint_label = Label.new()
	_hint_label = Label.new()
	_hint_label.text = "点击技能选中 → 左键槽位装备 | 右键槽位卸载 | 点击[绑定]切换按键 | K 关闭"
	_hint_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 12)
	_hint_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(0.6, 0.6, 0.6))
	left_vbox.add_child(_hint_label)

	# ── 右侧：装备槽 ──
	var right_vbox := VBoxContainer.new()
	right_vbox.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 8)
	main_hbox.add_child(right_vbox)

	var equip_title := Label.new()
	equip_title.text = "⚔️ 装备槽"
	equip_title.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 18)
	equip_title.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color.WHITE)
	right_vbox.add_child(equip_title)

	for i in range(SkillManager.MAX_SLOTS):
		var slot_panel := _make_equip_slot(i)
		right_vbox.add_child(slot_panel)
		_equip_slots.append(slot_panel)


## ── 装备槽（右侧） ──

func _make_equip_slot(idx: int) -> PanelContainer:
	var panel := PanelContainer.new()
	panel.custom_minimum_size = Vector2(220, 48)
	panel.add_theme_stylebox_override("panel", _make_slot_bg())

	var hbox := HBoxContainer.new()
	hbox.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 8)
	panel.add_child(hbox)

	# 图标
	var icon := TextureRect.new()
	icon.name = "Icon"
	icon.custom_minimum_size = Vector2(32, 32)
	icon.expand_mode = TextureRect.EXPAND_IGNORE_SIZE
	icon.stretch_mode = TextureRect.STRETCH_KEEP_ASPECT_CENTERED
	hbox.add_child(icon)

	# 名称 + 按键
	var info_vbox := VBoxContainer.new()
	info_vbox.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
	hbox.add_child(info_vbox)

	var name_label := Label.new()
	name_label.name = "Name"
	name_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 14)
	name_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color.WHITE)
	name_label.text = "空槽位"
	info_vbox.add_child(name_label)

	var bind_label := Label.new()
	bind_label.name = "Bind"
	bind_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 11)
	bind_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(0.5, 0.5, 0.5))
	bind_label.mouse_filter = Control.MOUSE_FILTER_STOP
	bind_label.gui_input.connect(_on_bind_label_clicked.bind(idx))
	info_vbox.add_child(bind_label)

	# 点击装备
	panel.gui_input.connect(_on_equip_slot_clicked.bind(idx))
	panel.mouse_filter = Control.MOUSE_FILTER_STOP

	return panel


func _on_equip_slot_clicked(event: InputEvent, idx: int) -> void:
	if event is InputEventMouseButton:
		if event.button_index == MOUSE_BUTTON_LEFT and event.pressed:
			if _selected_skill and _skill_manager:
				# 使用槽位当前绑定
				var bind: int = _skill_manager.get_slot(idx)["bind"]
				if bind < 0:
					bind = idx + 2  # 默认 KEY_1..KEY_4
				_skill_manager.equip_to_slot(idx, _selected_skill, bind)
				_selected_skill = null
				_refresh_all()
		elif event.button_index == MOUSE_BUTTON_RIGHT and event.pressed:
			if _skill_manager:
				_skill_manager.unequip_slot(idx)
				_refresh_all()


func _on_bind_label_clicked(event: InputEvent, idx: int) -> void:
	if event is InputEventMouseButton and event.button_index == MOUSE_BUTTON_LEFT and event.pressed:
		var slot := _skill_manager.get_slot(idx)
		var current_bind: int = slot["bind"]
		# 循环: 右键(1) → 左键(0) → 键1(2) → 键2(3) → 键3(4) → 键4(5) → 右键(1)...
		var order := [
			SkillManager.BindType.RIGHT_HAND,
			SkillManager.BindType.LEFT_HAND,
			SkillManager.BindType.KEY_1,
			SkillManager.BindType.KEY_2,
			SkillManager.BindType.KEY_3,
			SkillManager.BindType.KEY_4,
		]
		var pos := order.find(current_bind)
		var next_bind := order[(pos + 1) % order.size()] if pos >= 0 else order[0]

		var skill: SkillData = slot["skill"]
		if skill:
			_skill_manager.equip_to_slot(idx, skill, next_bind)
		else:
			# 空槽位也更新绑定
			_skill_manager.equip_to_slot(idx, null, next_bind)
		_refresh_all()


func _on_slot_changed(_idx: int) -> void:
	if visible:
		_refresh_all()


## ── 技能卡片（左侧网格） ──

func _refresh_all() -> void:
	_refresh_grid()
	_refresh_equip_slots()


func _refresh_grid() -> void:
	# 清除旧卡片
	for child in _skill_grid.get_children():
		child.queue_free()
	_skill_cards.clear()

	if not _skill_pool:
		return

	for skill in _skill_pool.skills:
		if not skill:
			continue
		var card := _make_skill_card(skill)
		_skill_grid.add_child(card)
		_skill_cards[skill] = card


func _make_skill_card(skill: SkillData) -> PanelContainer:
	var card := PanelContainer.new()
	card.custom_minimum_size = Vector2(100, 120)
	card.add_theme_stylebox_override("panel", _make_card_bg(skill == _selected_skill))

	var vbox := VBoxContainer.new()
	vbox.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 4)
	card.add_child(vbox)

	# 图标
	var icon := TextureRect.new()
	icon.custom_minimum_size = Vector2(48, 48)
	if skill.icon:
		icon.texture = skill.icon
	icon.expand_mode = TextureRect.EXPAND_IGNORE_SIZE
	icon.stretch_mode = TextureRect.STRETCH_KEEP_ASPECT_CENTERED
	icon.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_SHRINK_CENTER
	vbox.add_child(icon)

	# 名称
	var name_label := Label.new()
	name_label.text = skill.display_name
	name_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 13)
	name_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color.WHITE)
	name_label.horizontal_alignment = HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER
	vbox.add_child(name_label)

	# 类型标签
	var type_label := Label.new()
	type_label.text = _type_name(skill.skill_type)
	type_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 10)
	type_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", _type_color(skill.skill_type))
	type_label.horizontal_alignment = HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER
	vbox.add_child(type_label)

	# 信息
	var info_label := Label.new()
	info_label.text = "CD:%.1fs MP:%d" % [skill.cooldown, skill.mp_cost]
	info_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 10)
	info_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(0.6, 0.6, 0.6))
	info_label.horizontal_alignment = HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER
	vbox.add_child(info_label)

	# 点击
	card.gui_input.connect(_on_skill_card_clicked.bind(skill))
	card.mouse_filter = Control.MOUSE_FILTER_STOP

	return card


func _on_skill_card_clicked(event: InputEvent, skill: SkillData) -> void:
	if event is InputEventMouseButton and event.button_index == MOUSE_BUTTON_LEFT and event.pressed:
		_selected_skill = skill
		_refresh_all()


func _refresh_equip_slots() -> void:
	if not _skill_manager:
		return
	for i in range(SkillManager.MAX_SLOTS):
		var panel := _equip_slots[i]
		var slot: Dictionary = _skill_manager.get_slot(i)
		var skill: SkillData = slot["skill"]
		var bind: int = slot["bind"]

		var hbox := panel.get_child(0) as HBoxContainer
		var tex := hbox.get_node("Icon") as TextureRect
		var vbox := hbox.get_child(1) as VBoxContainer
		var name_lbl := vbox.get_node("Name") as Label
		var bind_lbl := vbox.get_node("Bind") as Label

		if skill:
			if skill.icon:
				tex.texture = skill.icon
				tex.modulate = Color(1, 1, 1, 1)
			else:
				tex.texture = null
				tex.modulate = Color(1, 1, 1, 0.3)
			name_lbl.text = skill.display_name
		else:
			tex.texture = null
			tex.modulate = Color(1, 1, 1, 0.15)
			name_lbl.text = "空槽位"

		bind_lbl.text = "绑定: %s" % _bind_full_name(bind)

		# 高亮已选中的技能
		if _selected_skill and skill == _selected_skill:
			panel.add_theme_stylebox_override("panel", _make_slot_bg(Color(0.3, 0.5, 0.3)))
		else:
			panel.add_theme_stylebox_override("panel", _make_slot_bg())


## ── 样式 ──

func _make_panel_bg() -> StyleBoxFlat:
	var sb := StyleBoxFlat.new()
	sb.bg_color = Color(0.08, 0.08, 0.14, 0.95)
	sb.border_width_left = 2
	sb.border_width_right = 2
	sb.border_width_top = 2
	sb.border_width_bottom = 2
	sb.border_color = Color(0.4, 0.4, 0.5, 1)
	sb.corner_radius_top_left = 8
	sb.corner_radius_top_right = 8
	sb.corner_radius_bottom_left = 8
	sb.corner_radius_bottom_right = 8
	return sb


func _make_card_bg(selected: bool = false) -> StyleBoxFlat:
	var sb := StyleBoxFlat.new()
	sb.bg_color = Color(0.2, 0.3, 0.2, 1) if selected else Color(0.15, 0.15, 0.2, 0.9)
	sb.border_width_left = 1
	sb.border_width_right = 1
	sb.border_width_top = 1
	sb.border_width_bottom = 1
	sb.border_color = Color(0.5, 0.8, 0.5, 1) if selected else Color(0.25, 0.25, 0.35, 1)
	sb.corner_radius_top_left = 4
	sb.corner_radius_top_right = 4
	sb.corner_radius_bottom_left = 4
	sb.corner_radius_bottom_right = 4
	return sb


func _make_slot_bg(color_override := Color(0.12, 0.12, 0.18, 0.9)) -> StyleBoxFlat:
	var sb := StyleBoxFlat.new()
	sb.bg_color = color_override
	sb.border_width_left = 1
	sb.border_width_right = 1
	sb.border_width_top = 1
	sb.border_width_bottom = 1
	sb.border_color = Color(0.3, 0.3, 0.4, 1)
	sb.corner_radius_top_left = 4
	sb.corner_radius_top_right = 4
	sb.corner_radius_bottom_left = 4
	sb.corner_radius_bottom_right = 4
	return sb


## ── 工具 ──

func _type_name(t: int) -> String:
	match t:
		SkillData.SkillType.PROJECTILE: return "🎯 投射物"
		SkillData.SkillType.BUFF:       return "🛡️ 增益"
		SkillData.SkillType.AOE:        return "💥 范围"
		SkillData.SkillType.DASH:       return "💨 位移"
	return "未知"


func _type_color(t: int) -> Color:
	match t:
		SkillData.SkillType.PROJECTILE: return Color(1.0, 0.5, 0.3)
		SkillData.SkillType.BUFF:       return Color(0.3, 0.7, 1.0)
		SkillData.SkillType.AOE:        return Color(1.0, 0.3, 0.3)
		SkillData.SkillType.DASH:       return Color(0.3, 1.0, 0.5)
	return Color.GRAY


func _bind_full_name(bind: int) -> String:
	match bind:
		SkillManager.BindType.LEFT_HAND:  return "左键"
		SkillManager.BindType.RIGHT_HAND: return "右键"
		SkillManager.BindType.KEY_1:      return "键1"
		SkillManager.BindType.KEY_2:      return "键2"
		SkillManager.BindType.KEY_3:      return "键3"
		SkillManager.BindType.KEY_4:      return "键4"
	return "未绑定"

content.text: 把三个键位绑在一个槽位上，操作不方便。把左右手独立出来。左右手可以绑定施法，后面也可以拿武器，但是不能一个手同时拿武器和施法。并且左右手施法都要有松手释放，目前左手施法时是瞬发。

history.content:
好的，这是一个合理的架构调整。设计如下：

---

## 🏗️ 左右手 + 快捷键 分离设计

```
SkillManager
├── 左手 (left_hand)  ← 技能 或 空(近战)
├── 右手 (right_hand) ← 技能 或 空(无动作)
└── 快捷栏 [槽0] [槽1] [槽2] [槽3]  ← 绑定键1~4
```

| 操作 | 按下 | 松手 |
|------|------|------|
| **左键** | 有技能→瞄准 / 无→近战 | 瞄准中→释放技能 |
| **右键** | 有技能→瞄准 | 瞄准中→释放技能 |
| **键1~4** | — | 瞬发（快捷键保持瞬发） |

开始实施：

## 步骤 1：重写 `SkillManager`
history.reasoning_content:
The user wants to separate left and right hand into independent systems:

1. **Left hand**: Can hold a weapon (melee) OR cast a spell (skill), but not both at once.
2. **Right hand**: Can hold a weapon OR cast a spell, but not both at once.
3. Both hands should use release-to-cast (not instant on press).

Currently:
- Left click → checks LEFT_HAND bind, if skill exists → instant cast; else → melee attack
- Right click → checks RIGHT_HAND bind, if skill exists → release cast (already implemented)

Changes needed:
1. Remove "left hand skill binding" from the SkillManager's BindType — or better, keep it but change the behavior.
2. Left hand: if a skill is bound → release to cast (like right hand); if no skill → melee attack
3. Right hand: same — if a skill is bound → release to cast; if no skill → nothing currently (right click has no melee function)
4. The SkillPool UI should still allow binding to LEFT_HAND and RIGHT_HAND, but the binding concept changes: it's "equip spell to this hand" not "bind this key to this spell".

Let me think about the design more carefully:

**Hand System**:
- Each hand has a state: FREE, WEAPON, SPELL
- Left hand default: WEAPON (melee)
- Right hand default: FREE (or could be WEAPON too)
- Equipping a spell to a hand replaces the weapon in that hand
- Equipping a weapon to a hand replaces the spell in that hand

For now (since weapons aren't implemented yet beyond melee):
- Left hand: melee by default, spell if equipped
- Right hand: nothing by default, spell if equipped

**Input behavior**:
- Both hands use **release-to-cast** for spells
- Left hand press → hold (aiming), release → cast spell OR melee attack
- Right hand press → hold (aiming), release → cast spell

Actually, the current melee system uses instant press-to-attack. If we change left hand to release-to-cast for melee too, that would change the melee feel. Let me think...

The user said: "左右手施法都要有松手释放" — both hands should use release-to-cast for SPELLS. Melee on left hand can stay instant.

But the user also said: "不能一个手同时拿武器和施法" — can't hold weapon and cast spell on the same hand. So left hand is EITHER melee OR spell, not both.

So the flow for left hand:
- Press left button → 
  - If SPELL equipped → start aiming
  - If WEAPON/melee → instant attack
- Release left button →
  - If SPELL equipped and was aiming → cast spell

For right hand:
- Press right button →
  - If SPELL equipped → start aiming  
  - If nothing → nothing
- Release right button →
  - If SPELL equipped and was aiming → cast spell

This means the states need to track "is aiming" state. Currently:
- `is_action_just_pressed("attack")` → immediate transition to attack/skill
- `is_action_just_released("skill")` → immediate transition to skill

I need to change to:
- On press "attack": if left hand has spell → enter "aiming" state; else → melee attack
- On release "attack": if was aiming → cast spell
- On press "skill": if right hand has spell → enter "aiming" state
- On release "skill": if was aiming → cast spell

For the "aiming" state, I could add a new state `PlayerAimState` or handle it within Idle/Move states by tracking whether we're currently pressing the button.

Actually, the simplest approach: handle the press/release logic directly in the Idle and Move states (and Attack state for dodge cancel).

Let me also update the SkillPool UI bind names to reflect "左手/右手" instead of "左键/右键".

And update the SkillBar bind labels similarly.

Also, I need to reconsider the BindType. Currently:
- LEFT_HAND = 0
- RIGHT_HAND = 1
- KEY_1 = 2, etc.

This is fine. But the terminology should shift from "key binding" to "equip slot": each of the 4 slots can be assigned to either left hand, right hand, or a hotkey.

Wait, let me re-read the user's request: "把三个键位绑在一个槽位上，操作不方便。把左右手独立出来。"

They're saying the current system where 6 bind types (L/R/1/2/3/4) can all go to any of the 4 slots is confusing. They want:
- Left hand and right hand are INDEPENDENT from the 4 hotkey slots
- Left hand can have a spell OR a weapon
- Right hand can have a spell OR a weapon
- The 4 slots are exclusively for hotkeys (1-4)

So the new design:
- **Left Hand**: separate equipment slot (spell or melee weapon)
- **Right Hand**: separate equipment slot (spell or melee weapon)  
- **Hotbar**: 4 slots, each bound to keys 1-4

This means SkillManager needs:
- `left_hand_skill: SkillData` (null = melee)
- `right_hand_skill: SkillData` (null = nothing)
- 4 hotkey slots (as before)

And the BindType simplifies to just KEY_1..KEY_4.

The SkillPool UI changes:
- Two dedicated hand slots at the top (左手/右手)
- 4 hotkey slots below

Let me implement this redesign.

Actually, this is getting complex. Let me simplify:

**SkillManager changes:**
- Remove `BindType` enum
- Add `left_hand_skill: SkillData` and `right_hand_skill: SkillData`
- Keep 4 hotkey slots (simplified)
- Methods: `equip_left(skill)`, `equip_right(skill)`, `unequip_left()`, `unequip_right()`

**State changes:**
- On press "attack" (left click):
  - If left_hand_skill → start aiming (track `_aiming_left: bool`)
  - Else → melee attack
- On release "attack":
  - If was aiming left → cast left_hand_skill
- On press "skill" (right click):
  - If right_hand_skill → start aiming (`_aiming_right: bool`)
- On release "skill":
  - If was aiming right → cast right_hand_skill

**SkillPool UI changes:**
- Two hand slots at top
- 4 hotkey slots below
- No more bind cycling — simpler UI

Let me implement this now. This is a significant refactor of SkillManager.

Let me also think about cooldowns. Left hand and right hand spells should each have their own cooldown tracking.

signal hand_changed(hand: String)  # "left" or "right"

var right_hand_skill: SkillData = null
var _slots: Array[Dictionary] = []  # hotkey slots

var _cooldowns: Dictionary = {}  # "left": float, "right": float, "slot_0": float, ...
```

    "left": 0.0,

function.arguments:
{"content": "class_name SkillBar
extends HBoxContainer
## 技能条 — 左手 [L] · 右手 [R] · 槽1 [1] · 槽2 [2] · 槽3 [3] · 槽4 [4]

const SLOT_SIZE := Vector2(48, 48)
const HAND_SIZE := Vector2(56, 48)

var _skill_manager: SkillManager = null
var _panels: Array[PanelContainer] = []
var _icons: Array[TextureRect] = []
var _masks: Array[ColorRect] = []
var _bind_labels: Array[Label] = []
var _cd_labels: Array[Label] = []
var _sources: Array[String] = []  ## "left", "right", "slot_0", ...


func setup(sm: SkillManager) -> void:
	_skill_manager = sm
	_skill_manager.hand_changed.connect(_on_hand_changed)
	_skill_manager.slot_changed.connect(_on_slot_changed)
	_skill_manager.cooldown_changed.connect(_on_cooldown)
	_build()


func _build() -> void:
	for child in get_children():
		child.queue_free()
	_panels.clear(); _icons.clear(); _masks.clear(); _bind_labels.clear(); _cd_labels.clear(); _sources.clear()

	# 左手
	_add_item("left", "L", HAND_SIZE)
	# 右手
	_add_item("right", "R", HAND_SIZE)
	# 快捷键 1-4
	for i in range(4):
		_add_item("slot_%d" % i, str(i + 1), SLOT_SIZE)

	_refresh_all()


func _add_item(source: String, label: String, size: Vector2) -> void:
	_sources.append(source)

	var panel := PanelContainer.new()
	panel.custom_minimum_size = size
	panel.add_theme_stylebox_override("panel", _make_bg())
	add_child(panel)
	_panels.append(panel)

	var inner := Control.new()
	inner.custom_minimum_size = size
	inner.clip_contents = true
	panel.add_child(inner)

	var icon := TextureRect.new()
	icon.size = size
	icon.expand_mode = TextureRect.EXPAND_IGNORE_SIZE
	icon.stretch_mode = TextureRect.STRETCH_KEEP_ASPECT_CENTERED
	icon.modulate = Color(1, 1, 1, 0.3)
	inner.add_child(icon)
	_icons.append(icon)

	var mask := ColorRect.new()
	mask.size = Vector2(size.x, 0)
	mask.color = Color(0, 0, 0, 0.6)
	mask.visible = false
	inner.add_child(mask)
	_masks.append(mask)

	var cd_label := Label.new()
	cd_label.size = size
	cd_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 14)
	cd_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color.WHITE)
	cd_label.horizontal_alignment = HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER
	cd_label.vertical_alignment = VERTICAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER
	cd_label.visible = false
	inner.add_child(cd_label)
	_cd_labels.append(cd_label)

	var bind_label := Label.new()
	bind_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 9)
	bind_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(1, 1, 1, 0.6))
	bind_label.horizontal_alignment = HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_RIGHT
	bind_label.vertical_alignment = VERTICAL_ALIGNMENT_BOTTOM
	bind_label.size = Vector2(size.x - 2, size.y - 2)
	bind_label.position = Vector2.ZERO
	bind_label.text = label
	inner.add_child(bind_label)
	_bind_labels.append(bind_label)


func _refresh_all() -> void:
	for i in range(_sources.size()):
		_refresh_idx(i)


func _refresh_idx(idx: int) -> void:
	var src := _sources[idx]
	var skill: SkillData
	match src:
		"left":  skill = _skill_manager.left_hand_skill
		"right": skill = _skill_manager.right_hand_skill
		_:       skill = _skill_manager.get_slot(src.trim_prefix("slot_").to_int())["skill"]

	var icon := _icons[idx]
	if skill and skill.icon:
		icon.texture = skill.icon
		icon.modulate = Color(1, 1, 1, 1)
	elif skill:
		icon.texture = null
		icon.modulate = Color(1, 1, 1, 0.5)
	else:
		icon.texture = null
		icon.modulate = Color(1, 1, 1, 0.12)
	
	_bind_labels[idx].visible = (skill == null)
	_update_cooldown(idx)


func _update_cooldown(idx: int) -> void:
	var remaining := _skill_manager.get_cooldown(_sources[idx])
	var total := _skill_manager.get_cooldown_total(_sources[idx])
	var size := HAND_SIZE if idx < 2 else SLOT_SIZE
	var mask := _masks[idx]
	var cd_label := _cd_labels[idx]

	if remaining > 0 and total > 0:
		mask.size = Vector2(size.x, size.y * remaining / total)
		mask.visible = true
		cd_label.text = "%.1f" % remaining
		cd_label.visible = true
	else:
		mask.visible = false
		cd_label.visible = false


func _on_hand_changed(_hand: String) -> void:
	for i in range(_sources.size()):
		if _sources[i] == "left" or _sources[i] == "right":
			_refresh_idx(i)


func _on_slot_changed(_idx: int) -> void:
	for i in range(_sources.size()):
		if _sources[i].begins_with("slot_"):
			_refresh_idx(i)


func _on_cooldown(source: String, _remaining: float, _total: float) -> void:
	for i in range(_sources.size()):
		if _sources[i] == source:
			_update_cooldown(i)
			return


func _make_bg() -> StyleBoxFlat:
	var sb := StyleBoxFlat.new()
	sb.bg_color = Color(0.1, 0.1, 0.15, 0.85)
	sb.border_width_left = 1; sb.border_width_right = 1
	sb.border_width_top = 1; sb.border_width_bottom = 1
	sb.border_color = Color(0.3, 0.3, 0.4, 1)
	sb.corner_radius_top_left = 4; sb.corner_radius_top_right = 4
	sb.corner_radius_bottom_left = 4; sb.corner_radius_bottom_right = 4
	return sb
", "path": "res://ui/skill_bar.gd"}

{"content": "class_name SkillPoolUI
extends CanvasLayer
## 技能池 — K 键。左手/右手 + 4 快捷键槽位

var _skill_pool: SkillPool = null
var _skill_manager: SkillManager = null
var _selected_skill: SkillData = null

var _background: ColorRect = null
var _panel: Panel = null
var _skill_grid: GridContainer = null
var _equip_slots: Array[PanelContainer] = []
var _equip_sources: Array[String] = []  ## "left","right","slot_0",...
var _hint_label: Label = null


func _ready() -> void:
	hide()
	_build_ui()


func _input(event: InputEvent) -> void:
	if event is InputEventKey and event.keycode == KEY_K and event.pressed:
		toggle()


func setup(pool: SkillPool, sm: SkillManager) -> void:
	_skill_pool = pool
	_skill_manager = sm
	sm.hand_changed.connect(_on_hand_changed)
	sm.slot_changed.connect(_on_slot_changed)


func toggle() -> void:
	if visible: close()
	else: open()


func open() -> void:
	_refresh_all()
	show()


func close() -> void:
	_selected_skill = null
	hide()


func _build_ui() -> void:
	_background = ColorRect.new()
	_background.color = Color(0, 0, 0, 0.6)
	_background.anchor_right = 1.0
	_background.anchor_bottom = 1.0
	add_child(_background)

	_panel = Panel.new()
	_panel.anchor_left = 0.15; _panel.anchor_right = 0.85
	_panel.anchor_top = 0.1; _panel.anchor_bottom = 0.9
	_panel.add_theme_stylebox_override("panel", _make_panel_bg())
	add_child(_panel)

	var margin := MarginContainer.new()
	margin.anchor_right = 1.0; margin.anchor_bottom = 1.0
	margin.add_theme_constant_override("margin_left", 16)
	margin.add_theme_constant_override("margin_top", 16)
	margin.add_theme_constant_override("margin_right", 16)
	margin.add_theme_constant_override("margin_bottom", 16)
	_panel.add_child(margin)

	var main_hbox := HBoxContainer.new()
	main_hbox.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 16)
	margin.add_child(main_hbox)

	# ── 左侧：技能网格 ──
	var left_vbox := VBoxContainer.new()
	left_vbox.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
	main_hbox.add_child(left_vbox)

	var title := Label.new()
	title.text = "📖 技能池"
	title.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 22)
	title.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color.WHITE)
	left_vbox.add_child(title)

	var scroll := ScrollContainer.new()
	scroll.size_flags_vertical = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
	scroll.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
	left_vbox.add_child(scroll)

	_skill_grid = GridContainer.new()
	_skill_grid.columns = 4
	_skill_grid.add_theme_constant_override("h_separation", 8)
	_skill_grid.add_theme_constant_override("v_separation", 8)
	scroll.add_child(_skill_grid)

	_hint_label = Label.new()
	_hint_label.text = "选技能 → 左键槽位装备 | 右键槽位卸载 | K 关闭"
	_hint_label.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 12)
	_hint_label.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(0.6, 0.6, 0.6))
	left_vbox.add_child(_hint_label)

	# ── 右侧：双手 + 快捷键槽 ──
	var right_vbox := VBoxContainer.new()
	right_vbox.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 6)
	main_hbox.add_child(right_vbox)

	right_vbox.add_child(_make_section_label("🖐️ 双手"))
	_add_equip_slot(right_vbox, "left", "左手")
	_add_equip_slot(right_vbox, "right", "右手")

	right_vbox.add_child(_make_section_label("⌨️ 快捷键"))
	for i in range(4):
		_add_equip_slot(right_vbox, "slot_%d" % i, "键 %d" % (i + 1))


func _make_section_label(text: String) -> Label:
	var lbl := Label.new()
	lbl.text = text
	lbl.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 14)
	lbl.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(0.7, 0.7, 0.7))
	return lbl


func _add_equip_slot(parent: Control, source: String, label: String) -> void:
	var panel := PanelContainer.new()
	panel.custom_minimum_size = Vector2(200, 40)
	panel.add_theme_stylebox_override("panel", _make_slot_bg())
	parent.add_child(panel)
	_equip_slots.append(panel)
	_equip_sources.append(source)

	var hbox := HBoxContainer.new()
	hbox.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 8)
	panel.add_child(hbox)

	var icon := TextureRect.new()
	icon.name = "Icon"
	icon.custom_minimum_size = Vector2(28, 28)
	icon.expand_mode = TextureRect.EXPAND_IGNORE_SIZE
	icon.stretch_mode = TextureRect.STRETCH_KEEP_ASPECT_CENTERED
	hbox.add_child(icon)

	var info := VBoxContainer.new()
	info.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_EXPAND_FILL
	hbox.add_child(info)

	var name_lbl := Label.new()
	name_lbl.name = "Name"
	name_lbl.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 13)
	name_lbl.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color.WHITE)
	info.add_child(name_lbl)

	var sub_lbl := Label.new()
	sub_lbl.name = "Sub"
	sub_lbl.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 10)
	sub_lbl.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color(0.5, 0.5, 0.5))
	sub_lbl.text = label
	info.add_child(sub_lbl)

	panel.gui_input.connect(_on_slot_clicked.bind(source))
	panel.mouse_filter = Control.MOUSE_FILTER_STOP


func _on_slot_clicked(event: InputEvent, source: String) -> void:
	if not event is InputEventMouseButton:
		return
	if event.button_index == MOUSE_BUTTON_LEFT and event.pressed:
		if _selected_skill and _skill_manager:
			_equip(source, _selected_skill)
			_selected_skill = null
			_refresh_all()
	elif event.button_index == MOUSE_BUTTON_RIGHT and event.pressed:
		if _skill_manager:
			_unequip(source)
			_refresh_all()


func _equip(source: String, skill: SkillData) -> void:
	match source:
		"left":  _skill_manager.equip_hand("left", skill)
		"right": _skill_manager.equip_hand("right", skill)
		_:       _skill_manager.equip_slot(source.trim_prefix("slot_").to_int(), skill)


func _unequip(source: String) -> void:
	match source:
		"left":  _skill_manager.unequip_hand("left")
		"right": _skill_manager.unequip_hand("right")
		_:       _skill_manager.unequip_slot(source.trim_prefix("slot_").to_int())


func _on_hand_changed(_hand: String) -> void:
	if visible: _refresh_all()


func _on_slot_changed(_idx: int) -> void:
	if visible: _refresh_all()


## ── 刷新 ──

func _refresh_all() -> void:
	_refresh_grid()
	_refresh_equip_slots()


func _refresh_grid() -> void:
	for child in _skill_grid.get_children():
		child.queue_free()
	if not _skill_pool:
		return
	for skill in _skill_pool.skills:
		if not skill: continue
		var card := _make_skill_card(skill)
		_skill_grid.add_child(card)


func _make_skill_card(skill: SkillData) -> PanelContainer:
	var card := PanelContainer.new()
	card.custom_minimum_size = Vector2(90, 110)
	card.add_theme_stylebox_override("panel", _make_card_bg(skill == _selected_skill))

	var vbox := VBoxContainer.new()
	vbox.add_theme_constant_override("separation", 2)
	card.add_child(vbox)

	var icon := TextureRect.new()
	icon.custom_minimum_size = Vector2(40, 40)
	if skill.icon: icon.texture = skill.icon
	icon.expand_mode = TextureRect.EXPAND_IGNORE_SIZE
	icon.stretch_mode = TextureRect.STRETCH_KEEP_ASPECT_CENTERED
	icon.size_flags_horizontal = Control.SIZE_SHRINK_CENTER
	vbox.add_child(icon)

	var nm := Label.new()
	nm.text = skill.display_name
	nm.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 12)
	nm.add_theme_color_override("font_color", Color.WHITE)
	nm.horizontal_alignment = HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER
	vbox.add_child(nm)

	var tp := Label.new()
	tp.text = _type_name(skill.skill_type)
	tp.add_theme_font_size_override("font_size", 9)
	tp.add_theme_color_override("font_color", _type_color(skill.skill_type))
	tp.horizontal_alignment = HORIZONTAL_ALIGNMENT_CENTER
	vbox.add_child(tp)

	card.gui_input.connect(_on_card_clicked.bind(skill))
	card.mouse_filter = Control.MOUSE_FILTER_STOP
	return card


func _on_card_clicked(event: InputEvent, skill: SkillData) -> void:
	if event is InputEventMouseButton and event.button_index == MOUSE_BUTTON_LEFT and event.pressed:
		_selected_skill = skill
		_refresh_all()


func _refresh_equip_slots() -> void:
	for i in range(_equip_sources.size()):
		var src := _equip_sources[i]
		var panel := _equip_slots[i]
		var skill: SkillData
		match src:
			"left":  skill = _skill_manager.left_hand_skill
			"right": skill = _skill_manager.right_hand_skill
			_:       skill = _skill_manager.get_slot(src.trim_prefix("slot_").to_int())["skill"]

		var hbox := panel.get_child(0) as HBoxContainer
		var tex := hbox.get_node("Icon") as TextureRect
		var vbox := hbox.get_child(1) as VBoxContainer
		var name_lbl := vbox.get_node("Name") as Label

		if skill:
			if skill.icon: tex.texture = skill.icon; tex.modulate = Color(1,1,1,1)
			else: tex.texture = null; tex.modulate = Color(1,1,1,0.3)
			name_lbl.text = skill.display_name
		else:
			tex.texture = null; tex.modulate = Color(1,1,1,0.1)
			name_lbl.text = "空"

		if _selected_skill and skill == _selected_skill:
			panel.add_theme_stylebox_override("panel", _make_slot_bg(Color(0.3, 0.5, 0.3)))
		else:
			panel.add_theme_stylebox_override("panel", _make_slot_bg())


## ── 样式 ──

func _make_panel_bg() -> StyleBoxFlat:
	var sb := StyleBoxFlat.new()
	sb.bg_color = Color(0.08, 0.08, 0.14, 0.95)
	sb.border_width_left = 2; sb.border_width_right = 2
	sb.border_width_top = 2; sb.border_width_bottom = 2
	sb.border_color = Color(0.4, 0.4, 0.5, 1)
	sb.corner_radius_top_left = 8; sb.corner_radius_top_right = 8
	sb.corner_radius_bottom_left = 8; sb.corner_radius_bottom_right = 8
	return sb


func _make_card_bg(selected: bool = false) -> StyleBoxFlat:
	var sb := StyleBoxFlat.new()
	sb.bg_color = Color(0.2, 0.3, 0.2, 1) if selected else Color(0.15, 0.15, 0.2, 0.9)
	sb.border_width_left = 1; sb.border_width_right = 1
	sb.border_width_top = 1; sb.border_width_bottom = 1
	sb.border_color = Color(0.5, 0.8, 0.5, 1) if selected else Color(0.25, 0.25, 0.35, 1)
	sb.corner_radius_top_left = 4; sb.corner_radius_top_right = 4
	sb.corner_radius_bottom_left = 4; sb.corner_radius_bottom_right = 4
	return sb


func _make_slot_bg(color_override := Color(0.12, 0.12, 0.18, 0.9)) -> StyleBoxFlat:
	var sb := StyleBoxFlat.new()
	sb.bg_color = color_override
	sb.border_width_left = 1; sb.border_width_right = 1
	sb.border_width_top = 1; sb.border_width_bottom = 1
	sb.border_color = Color(0.3, 0.3, 0.4, 1)
	sb.corner_radius_top_left = 4; sb.corner_radius_top_right = 4
	sb.corner_radius_bottom_left = 4; sb.corner_radius_bottom_right = 4
	return sb


func _type_name(t: int) -> String:
	match t:
		SkillData.SkillType.PROJECTILE: return "🎯"
		SkillData.SkillType.BUFF:       return "🛡️"
		SkillData.SkillType.AOE:        return "💥"
		SkillData.SkillType.DASH:       return "💨"
	return "?"


func _type_color(t: int) -> Color:
	match t:
		SkillData.SkillType.PROJECTILE: return Color(1.0, 0.5, 0.3)
		SkillData.SkillType.BUFF:       return Color(0.3, 0.7, 1.0)
		SkillData.SkillType.AOE:        return Color(1.0, 0.3, 0.3)
		SkillData.SkillType.DASH:       return Color(0.3, 1.0, 0.5)
	return Color.GRAY

# ✅ 左右手分离完成！

## 📊 架构变更

| 之前 | 之后 |
|------|------|
| 4 槽共用 6 种绑定(L/R/1-4) | **左手/右手独立** + 4 快捷键槽 |

| 操作 | 行为 |
|------|------|

| **右键按下** | 有技能→瞄准 |

┌──────┬──────┬──────┬──────┬──────┬──────┐

```

└────┘                    │     空      │ 右手

                          │     空      │ 键4
